title: A Prediction-as-Perception Framework for 3D Object Detection
summary: Humans combine prediction and perception to observe the world. When faced with rapidly moving birds or insects, we can only perceive them clearly by predicting their next position and focusing our gaze there. Inspired by this, this paper proposes the Prediction-As-Perception (PAP) framework, integrating a prediction-perception architecture into 3D object perception tasks to enhance the model's perceptual accuracy. The PAP framework consists of two main modules: prediction and perception, primarily utilizing continuous frame information as input. Firstly, the prediction module forecasts the potential future positions of ego vehicles and surrounding traffic participants based on the perception results of the current frame. These predicted positions are then passed as queries to the perception module of the subsequent frame. The perceived results are iteratively fed back into the prediction module. We evaluated the PAP structure using the end-to-end model UniAD on the nuScenes dataset. The results demonstrate that the PAP structure improves UniAD's target tracking accuracy by 10% and increases the inference speed by 15%. This indicates that such a biomimetic design significantly enhances the efficiency and accuracy of perception models while reducing computational resource consumption.

AI.tldr: 本文提出受人类视觉系统启发的预测-感知(PAP)框架，通过将预测模块的输出作为感知模块的查询输入，实现预测与感知的深度融合。实验表明该框架在nuScenes数据集上使UniAD的目标跟踪精度提升10%，推理速度提升15%。
AI.motivation: 人类在观察快速移动的物体（如鸟类或昆虫）时，需要预测其下一位置并聚焦视线才能清晰感知。受此启发，提出将预测-感知架构集成到3D目标感知任务中，以提升模型的感知精度。
AI.method: PAP框架包含两个核心模块：预测模块和感知模块。预测模块基于当前帧感知结果预测自车和周围交通参与者的未来位置；这些预测位置作为查询传递给下一帧的感知模块；感知结果迭代反馈回预测模块。实验采用UniAD模型在nuScenes数据集上评估。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上的评估表明，PAP结构使UniAD的目标跟踪精度提升10%，推理速度提升15%。
AI.conclusion: PAP框架通过将预测模块的输出作为感知模块的查询输入，实现了预测与感知的深度融合。这种双向迭代反馈机制模拟了人类视觉系统的预测-感知协同工作方式，在保持高感知精度的同时显著降低了计算资源消耗。实验结果表明，该框架在目标跟踪精度上提升10%，推理速度提升15%，证明了该生物启发式设计的有效性。

title: MoKus: Leveraging Cross-Modal Knowledge Transfer for Knowledge-Aware Concept Customization
summary: Concept customization typically binds rare tokens to a target concept. Unfortunately, these approaches often suffer from unstable performance as the pretraining data seldom contains these rare tokens. Meanwhile, these rare tokens fail to convey the inherent knowledge of the target concept. Consequently, we introduce Knowledge-aware Concept Customization, a novel task aiming at binding diverse textual knowledge to target visual concepts. This task requires the model to identify the knowledge within the text prompt to perform high-fidelity customized generation. Meanwhile, the model should efficiently bind all the textual knowledge to the target concept. Therefore, we propose MoKus, a novel framework for knowledge-aware concept customization. Our framework relies on a key observation: cross-modal knowledge transfer, where modifying knowledge within the text modality naturally transfers to the visual modality during generation. Inspired by this observation, MoKus contains two stages: (1) In visual concept learning, we first learn the anchor representation to store the visual information of the target concept. (2) In textual knowledge updating, we update the answer for the knowledge queries to the anchor representation, enabling high-fidelity customized generation. To further comprehensively evaluate our proposed MoKus on the new task, we introduce the first benchmark for knowledge-aware concept customization: KnowCusBench. Extensive evaluations have demonstrated that MoKus outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the cross-model knowledge transfer allows MoKus to be easily extended to other knowledge-aware applications like virtual concept creation and concept erasure. We also demonstrate the capability of our method to achieve improvements on world knowledge benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了知识感知概念定制（Knowledge-aware Concept Customization）新任务，旨在将多样化的文本知识绑定到目标视觉概念，并提出MoKus框架通过两阶段（视觉概念学习和文本知识更新）实现高保真定制生成，首个基准KnowCusBench验证了其优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有概念定制方法绑定稀有token存在性能不稳定问题，且稀有token无法传达目标概念的内在知识，因此需要一种将文本知识绑定到视觉概念的新方法。
AI.method: MoKus框架包含两个阶段：1）视觉概念学习阶段学习锚点表示以存储目标概念的视觉信息；2）文本知识更新阶段将知识查询的答案更新到锚点表示，实现跨模态知识转移，使文本模态的修改自然传递到视觉模态。
AI.result: MoKus在KnowCusBench基准上显著优于现有最先进方法，并可扩展到虚拟概念创建和概念擦除等应用，同时在世界知识基准上取得提升。
AI.conclusion: 知识感知概念定制是一个具有前景的新任务，跨模态知识转移机制为高保真定制生成提供了有效路径，MoKus框架为该领域奠定了基础。

The methods (concept customization for images) are unrelated to 3D motion generation models needed in the profile.

title: A2Z-10M+: Geometric Deep Learning with A-to-Z BRep Annotations for AI-Assisted CAD Modeling and Reverse Engineering
comment: 27 pages, accepted to IEEE CVF CVPR 2026
summary: Reverse engineering and rapid prototyping of computer-aided design (CAD) models from 3D scans, sketches, or simple text prompts are vital in industrial product design. However, recent advances in geometric deep learning techniques lack a multi-modal understanding of parametric CAD features stored in their boundary representation (BRep). This study presents the largest compilation of 10 million multi-modal annotations and metadata for 1 million ABC CAD models, namely A2Z, to unlock an unprecedented level of BRep learning. A2Z comprises (i) high-resolution meshes with salient 3D scanning features, (ii) 3D hand-drawn sketches equipped with (iii) geometric and topological information about BRep co-edges, corners, and surfaces, and (iv) textual captions and tags describing the product in the mechanical world. Creating such carefully structured, large-scale data, which requires nearly 5 terabytes of storage to leverage unparalleled CAD learning/retrieval tasks, is very challenging. The scale, quality, and diversity of our multi-modal annotations are assessed using novel metrics, GPT-5, Gemini, and extensive human feedback mechanisms. To this end, we also merge an additional 25,000 CAD models of electronic enclosures (e.g., tablets, ports) designed by skilled professionals with our A2Z dataset. Subsequently, we train and benchmark a foundation model on a subset of 150K CAD models to detect BRep co-edges and corner vertices from 3D scans, a key downstream task in CAD reverse engineering. The annotated dataset, metrics, and checkpoints will be publicly released to support numerous research directions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了A2Z数据集，包含1000万个多模态注释和100万个ABC CAD模型，用于解锁边界表示（BRep）学习。该数据集整合了高分辨率网格、带注释的3D手绘草图、BRep几何拓扑信息以及文本描述，并额外添加了25000个电子外壳CAD模型。作者基于15万CAD模型训练了基础模型，用于从3D扫描中检测BRep共边和角点顶点。

title: FC-Track: Overlap-Aware Post-Association Correction for Online Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Reliable multi-object tracking (MOT) is essential for robotic systems operating in complex and dynamic environments. Despite recent advances in detection and association, online MOT methods remain vulnerable to identity switches caused by frequent occlusions and object overlap, where incorrect associations can propagate over time and degrade tracking reliability. We present a lightweight post-association correction framework (FC-Track) for online MOT that explicitly targets overlap-induced mismatches during inference. The proposed method suppresses unreliable appearance updates under high-overlap conditions using an Intersection over Area (IoA)-based filtering strategy, and locally corrects detection-to-tracklet mismatches through appearance similarity comparison within overlapped tracklet pairs. By preventing short-term mismatches from propagating, our framework effectively mitigates long-term identity switches without resorting to global optimization or re-identification. The framework operates online without global optimization or re-identification, making it suitable for real-time robotic applications. We achieve 81.73 MOTA, 82.81 IDF1, and 66.95 HOTA on the MOT17 test set with a running speed of 5.7 FPS, and 77.52 MOTA, 80.90 IDF1, and 65.67 HOTA on the MOT20 test set with a running speed of 0.6 FPS. Specifically, our framework FC-Track produces only 29.55% long-term identity switches, which is substantially lower than existing online trackers. Meanwhile, our framework maintains state-of-the-art performance on the MOT20 benchmark.

AI.tldr: FC-Track是一种轻量级的在线多目标跟踪后关联校正框架，通过IoA过滤和外观相似度比较来解决目标重叠导致的身份切换问题，在MOT17和MOT20数据集上取得先进性能。
AI.motivation: 在线多目标跟踪方法在复杂动态环境中容易受到频繁遮挡和目标重叠导致的身份切换影响，错误的关联会随时间传播并降低跟踪可靠性。现有方法需要全局优化或重识别，不适合实时机器人应用。
AI.method: 提出基于Intersection over Area(IoA)的过滤策略，在高重叠条件下抑制不可靠的外观更新；通过对重叠轨迹对进行外观相似度比较来局部校正检测-轨迹匹配错误，从而防止短期错误传播。
AI.result: MOT17测试集：81.73 MOTA、82.81 IDF1、66.95 HOTA，速度5.7 FPS；MOT20测试集：77.52 MOTA、80.90 IDF1、65.67 HOTA，速度0.6 FPS；长期身份切换仅29.55%，显著低于现有在线跟踪器；在MOT20上达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需全局优化或重识别即可有效减少长期身份切换，适合实时机器人应用，在目标重叠场景下表现优异。

title: Cheers: Decoupling Patch Details from Semantic Representations Enables Unified Multimodal Comprehension and Generation
summary: A recent cutting-edge topic in multimodal modeling is to unify visual comprehension and generation within a single model. However, the two tasks demand mismatched decoding regimes and visual representations, making it non-trivial to jointly optimize within a shared feature space. In this work, we present Cheers, a unified multimodal model that decouples patch-level details from semantic representations, thereby stabilizing semantics for multimodal understanding and improving fidelity for image generation via gated detail residuals. Cheers includes three key components: (i) a unified vision tokenizer that encodes and compresses image latent states into semantic tokens for efficient LLM conditioning, (ii) an LLM-based Transformer that unifies autoregressive decoding for text generation and diffusion decoding for image generation, and (iii) a cascaded flow matching head that decodes visual semantics first and then injects semantically gated detail residuals from the vision tokenizer to refine high-frequency content. Experiments on popular benchmarks demonstrate that Cheers matches or surpasses advanced UMMs in both visual understanding and generation. Cheers also achieves 4x token compression, enabling more efficient high-resolution image encoding and generation. Notably, Cheers outperforms the Tar-1.5B on the popular benchmarks GenEval and MMBench, while requiring only 20% of the training cost, indicating effective and efficient (i.e., 4x token compression) unified multimodal modeling. We will release all code and data for future research.

AI.tldr: Cheers是一个统一多模态模型，通过将patch级细节与语义表示解耦，在稳定语义理解的同时通过门控细节残差提高图像生成质量。该模型在视觉理解和生成任务上表现优异，且训练效率高（仅需20%训练成本），4x token压缩率使其更加高效。
AI.motivation: 统一视觉理解和生成是多模态建模的前沿课题，但两项任务需要不匹配的解码机制和视觉表示，在共享特征空间中进行联合优化并非易事。
AI.method: 提出三个关键组件：(1)统一视觉分词器，将图像潜在状态编码压缩为语义token；(2)基于LLM的Transformer，统一文本自回归生成和图像扩散生成；(3)级联流匹配头，先解码视觉语义，再注入门控细节残差以细化高频内容。
AI.result: Cheers在流行基准测试中匹配或超越先进UMM；在视觉理解和生成方面表现优异；实现4x token压缩，实现更高效的高分辨率图像编码和生成；在GenEval和MMBench上超越Tar-1.5B，仅需20%训练成本。
AI.conclusion: Cheers实现了有效且高效的统一多模态建模，具有4x token压缩率。在GenEval和MMBench上超越了Tar-1.5B，同时仅需20%的训练成本，展示了在视觉理解和生成方面的卓越性能。

title: RoboStereo: Dual-Tower 4D Embodied World Models for Unified Policy Optimization
summary: Scalable Embodied AI faces fundamental constraints due to prohibitive costs and safety risks of real-world interaction. While Embodied World Models (EWMs) offer promise through imagined rollouts, existing approaches suffer from geometric hallucinations and lack unified optimization frameworks for practical policy improvement. We introduce RoboStereo, a symmetric dual-tower 4D world model that employs bidirectional cross-modal enhancement to ensure spatiotemporal geometric consistency and alleviate physics hallucinations. Building upon this high-fidelity 4D simulator, we present the first unified framework for world-model-based policy optimization: (1) Test-Time Policy Augmentation (TTPA) for pre-execution verification, (2) Imitative-Evolutionary Policy Learning (IEPL) leveraging visual perceptual rewards to learn from expert demonstrations, and (3) Open-Exploration Policy Learning (OEPL) enabling autonomous skill discovery and self-correction. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate RoboStereo achieves state-of-the-art generation quality, with our unified framework delivering >97% average relative improvement on fine-grained manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: RoboStereo是一种对称双塔4D世界模型，通过双向跨模态增强解决几何幻觉问题，并首次提出统一的世界模型策略优化框架(TTPA、IEPL、OEPL)，在细粒度操作任务上实现超过97%的性能提升
AI.motivation: Scalable Embodied AI面临现实世界交互的高成本和安全风险限制，而现有的Embodied World Models (EWMs)存在几何幻觉问题，缺乏统一的优化框架来改进策略
AI.method: 提出RoboStereo对称双塔4D世界模型，采用双向跨模态增强确保时空几何一致性，缓解物理幻觉；在此基础上构建统一框架包含：(1)测试时策略增强(TTPA)用于执行前验证，(2)模仿进化策略学习(IEPL)利用视觉感知奖励从专家演示学习，(3)开放探索策略学习(OEPL)实现自主技能发现和自纠正
AI.result: RoboStereo达到最先进的生成质量，统一框架在细粒度操作任务上实现超过97%的平均相对提升
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次提出了世界模型基于策略优化的统一框架，通过双向跨模态增强有效解决几何和物理幻觉问题，在细粒度操作任务上取得显著性能提升

title: Hierarchical Dual-Change Collaborative Learning for UAV Scene Change Captioning
summary: This paper proposes a novel task for UAV scene understanding - UAV Scene Change Captioning (UAV-SCC) - which aims to generate natural language descriptions of semantic changes in dynamic aerial imagery captured from a movable viewpoint. Unlike traditional change captioning that mainly describes differences between image pairs captured from a fixed camera viewpoint over time, UAV scene change captioning focuses on image-pair differences resulting from both temporal and spatial scene variations dynamically captured by a moving camera. The key challenge lies in understanding viewpoint-induced scene changes from UAV image pairs that share only partially overlapping scene content due to viewpoint shifts caused by camera rotation, while effectively exploiting the relative orientation between the two images. To this end, we propose a Hierarchical Dual-Change Collaborative Learning (HDC-CL) method for UAV scene change captioning. In particular, a novel transformer, \emph{i.e.} Dynamic Adaptive Layout Transformer (DALT) is designed to adaptively model diverse spatial layouts of the image pair, where the interrelated features derived from the overlapping and non-overlapping regions are learned within the flexible and unified encoding layer. Furthermore, we propose a Hierarchical Cross-modal Orientation Consistency Calibration (HCM-OCC) method to enhance the model's sensitivity to viewpoint shift directions, enabling more accurate change captioning. To facilitate in-depth research on this task, we construct a new benchmark dataset, named UAV-SCC dataset, for UAV scene change captioning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on this task. The dataset and code will be publicly released upon acceptance of this paper.

AI.tldr: 提出无人机场景变化captioning新任务(UAV-SCC)，解决移动视角下航拍图像对的语义变化描述问题，设计了HDC-CL方法包含DALT和HCM-OCC组件，并构建了UAV-SCC基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统变化captioning主要描述固定视角下图像对的差异，而UAV场景变化captioning需要处理移动相机产生的时空场景变化带来的视角偏移问题，核心挑战在于理解因视角变化导致的部分重叠场景中的变化。
AI.method: 提出层次化双变化协作学习(HDC-CL)方法，包含动态自适应布局Transformer(DALT)和层次化跨模态方向一致性校准(HCM-OCC)两个核心组件。DALT自适应建模图像对的多样空间布局，在统一编码层中学习重叠和非重叠区域的关联特征；HCM-OCC增强模型对视角变化方向的敏感性。
AI.result: 在新建的UAV-SCC数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了所提方法的有效性并达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的HDC-CL方法在UAV-SCC任务上实现了最先进的性能，新构建的UAV-SCC数据集为该领域研究提供了重要基准。

title: Team LEYA in 10th ABAW Competition: Multimodal Ambivalence/Hesitancy Recognition Approach
summary: Ambivalence/hesitancy recognition in unconstrained videos is a challenging problem due to the subtle, multimodal, and context-dependent nature of this behavioral state. In this paper, a multimodal approach for video-level ambivalence/hesitancy recognition is presented for the 10th ABAW Competition. The proposed approach integrates four complementary modalities: scene, face, audio, and text. Scene dynamics are captured with a VideoMAE-based model, facial information is encoded through emotional frame-level embeddings aggregated by statistical pooling, acoustic representations are extracted with EmotionWav2Vec2.0 and processed by a Mamba-based temporal encoder, and linguistic cues are modeled using fine-tuned transformer-based text models. The resulting unimodal embeddings are further combined using multimodal fusion models, including prototype-augmented variants. Experiments on the BAH corpus demonstrate clear gains of multimodal fusion over all unimodal baselines. The best unimodal configuration achieved an average MF1 of 70.02%, whereas the best multimodal fusion model reached 83.25%. The highest final test performance, 71.43%, was obtained by an ensemble of five prototype-augmented fusion models. The obtained results highlight the importance of complementary multimodal cues and robust fusion strategies for ambivalence/hesitancy recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无约束视频中犹豫/矛盾情绪识别得多模态方法，整合场景、面部、音频和文本四种模态，在BAH数据集上取得了71.43%的最终测试性能。
AI.motivation: 无约束视频中的犹豫/矛盾情绪识别是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为这种行为状态具有微妙、多模态和上下文依赖的特点。

AI.result: 最佳单模态配置达到70.02%的平均MF1，最佳多模态融合模型达到83.25%，五个原型增强融合模型集成的最终测试性能为71.43%。
AI.conclusion: 结果强调了互补多模态线索和鲁棒融合策略对于犹豫/矛盾情绪识别的重要性。

title: From Sparse to Dense: Multi-View GRPO for Flow Models via Augmented Condition Space
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as a powerful framework for preference alignment in text-to-image (T2I) flow models. However, we observe that the standard paradigm where evaluating a group of generated samples against a single condition suffers from insufficient exploration of inter-sample relationships, constraining both alignment efficacy and performance ceilings. To address this sparse single-view evaluation scheme, we propose Multi-View GRPO (MV-GRPO), a novel approach that enhances relationship exploration by augmenting the condition space to create a dense multi-view reward mapping. Specifically, for a group of samples generated from one prompt, MV-GRPO leverages a flexible Condition Enhancer to generate semantically adjacent yet diverse captions. These captions enable multi-view advantage re-estimation, capturing diverse semantic attributes and providing richer optimization signals. By deriving the probability distribution of the original samples conditioned on these new captions, we can incorporate them into the training process without costly sample regeneration. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MV-GRPO achieves superior alignment performance over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 针对文本到图像流模型偏好对齐中单视图评估方案的局限性，提出MV-GRPO方法，通过条件增强器生成多样化字幕实现多视图优势重估计，显著提升了对齐性能

AI.method: 提出MV-GRPO方法，利用条件增强器生成语义相近但多样化的字幕，通过多视图优势重估计捕获多样化语义属性，为优化提供更丰富的信号，同时通过基于原始样本在新字幕条件下的概率分布实现无需重新生成样本的训练
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明MV-GRPO在文本到图像模型的偏好对齐任务中实现了优于最先进方法的对齐性能
AI.conclusion: MV-GRPO通过增强条件空间创建密集多视图奖励映射，有效解决了单视图评估方案的局限性，在文本到图像模型的偏好对齐任务中实现了最先进的性能

title: Finite Difference Flow Optimization for RL Post-Training of Text-to-Image Models
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a standard technique for post-training diffusion-based image synthesis models, as it enables learning from reward signals to explicitly improve desirable aspects such as image quality and prompt alignment. In this paper, we propose an online RL variant that reduces the variance in the model updates by sampling paired trajectories and pulling the flow velocity in the direction of the more favorable image. Unlike existing methods that treat each sampling step as a separate policy action, we consider the entire sampling process as a single action. We experiment with both high-quality vision language models and off-the-shelf quality metrics for rewards, and evaluate the outputs using a broad set of metrics. Our method converges faster and yields higher output quality and prompt alignment than previous approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于扩散模型后训练的在线强化学习新方法，通过将整个采样过程作为单一动作并对配对轨迹进行对比，降低了模型更新方差，实现了更快的收敛和更好的图像质量与提示对齐。

AI.result: 该方法收敛速度更快，输出质量更高，提示对齐效果优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法在收敛速度、输出质量和提示对齐方面均优于现有方法。

title: VGGT-World: Transforming VGGT into an Autoregressive Geometry World Model
summary: World models that forecast scene evolution by generating future video frames devote the bulk of their capacity to photometric details, yet the resulting predictions often remain geometrically inconsistent. We present VGGT-World, a geometry world model that side-steps video generation entirely and instead forecasts the temporal evolution of frozen geometry-foundation-model (GFM) features. Concretely, we repurpose the latent tokens of a frozen VGGT as the world state and train a lightweight temporal flow transformer to autoregressively predict their future trajectory. Two technical challenges arise in this high-dimensional (d=1024) feature space: (i) standard velocity-prediction flow matching collapses, and (ii) autoregressive rollout suffers from compounding exposure bias. We address the first with a clean-target (z-prediction) parameterization that yields a substantially higher signal-to-noise ratio, and the second with a two-stage latent flow-forcing curriculum that progressively conditions the model on its own partially denoised rollouts. Experiments on KITTI, Cityscapes, and TartanAir demonstrate that VGGT-World significantly outperforms the strongest baselines in depth forecasting while running 3.6-5 times faster with only 0.43B trainable parameters, establishing frozen GFM features as an effective and efficient predictive state for 3D world modeling.

AI.tldr: VGGT-World是一种几何世界模型，通过预测冻结的VGGT特征演化而非生成视频来实现场景预测，使用z预测参数化和两阶段流强制课程解决高维特征空间中的流匹配崩溃和曝光偏差问题，在深度预测任务上以更少参数和更快速度超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前预测场景演化的世界模型主要关注光度细节，导致几何不一致性问题，作者认为应绕过视频生成，直接预测几何基础模型（GFM）特征的时序演化。
AI.method: 1. 将冻结的VGGT潜在标记作为世界状态；2. 训练轻量级时间流变换器自回归预测未来轨迹；3. 采用清洁目标（z预测）参数化解决速度预测流匹配崩溃问题；4. 设计两阶段潜在流强制课程逐步让模型基于自身部分去噪 rollout 进行条件化。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Cityscapes和TartanAir数据集上，VGGT-World在深度预测方面显著超越最强基线，且推理速度快3.6-5倍，仅需0.43B可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: VGGT-World以仅0.43B可训练参数实现了显著优于最强基线的深度预测性能，运行速度快3.6-5倍，验证了冻结的几何基础模型特征是3D世界建模的有效且高效预测状态。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses scene-level geometry prediction (depth estimation) for autonomous driving datasets, which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D human motion generation. While both involve computer vision, the application domains are distinct: the paper deals with scene/geometry world models for depth prediction, not human motion extraction from video. The methods also differ - this uses VGGT feature prediction and flow matching, not the video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance) or VLM-based quality supervision mentioned in the profile. The pain points about extracting 3D motion priors from 2D video for character motion are not addressed.

title: VFM-Recon: Unlocking Cross-Domain Scene-Level Neural Reconstruction with Scale-Aligned Foundation Priors
summary: Scene-level neural volumetric reconstruction from monocular videos remains challenging, especially under severe domain shifts. Although recent advances in vision foundation models (VFMs) provide transferable generalized priors learned from large-scale data, their scaleambiguous predictions are incompatible with the scale consistency required by volumetric fusion. To address this gap, we present VFMRecon, the first attempt to bridge transferable VFM priors with scaleconsistent requirements in scene-level neural reconstruction. Specifically, we first introduce a lightweight scale alignment stage that restores multiview scale coherence. We then integrate pretrained VFM features into the neural volumetric reconstruction pipeline via lightweight task-specific adapters, which are trained for reconstruction while preserving the crossdomain robustness of pretrained representations. We train our model on ScanNet train split and evaluate on both in-distribution ScanNet test split and out-of-distribution TUM RGB-D and Tanks and Temples datasets. The results demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-theart performance across all datasets domains. In particular, on the challenging outdoor Tanks and Temples dataset, our model achieves an F1 score of 70.1 in reconstructed mesh evaluation, substantially outperforming the closest competitor, VGGT, which only attains 51.8.

AI.tldr: VFMRecon首次将视觉基础模型的迁移先验与场景级神经重建的尺度一致性要求结合，通过尺度对齐和轻量适配器实现跨域鲁棒的三维重建，在室外Tanks and Temples数据集上F1分数70.1%显著领先。
AI.motivation: 场景级神经体素重建在严重域迁移下仍具挑战，虽视觉基础模型(VFM)提供可迁移的跨域先验，但其尺度模糊预测与体素融合所需的尺度一致性不兼容。
AI.method: 1) 引入轻量级尺度对齐阶段恢复多视角尺度一致性；2) 通过轻量级任务特定适配器将预训练VFM特征融入神经体素重建管道，在保留跨域鲁棒性的同时训练重建任务。
AI.result: 在ScanNet测试集及域外TUM RGB-D和Tanks and Temples数据集上均达SOTA；Tanks and Temples上F1为70.1%，远超VGGT的51.8%。
AI.conclusion: VFMRecon通过轻量级适配器将VFM先验与尺度一致性结合，在ScanNet测试集及域外TUM RGB-D和Tanks and Temples数据集上实现SOTA性能，在Tanks and Temples上F1分数达70.1%，显著领先VGGT的51.8%。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D SCENE RECONSTRUCTION (photogrammetry/NeRF-like), not 3D MOTION GENERATION. The research profile specifically targets extracting 3D MOTION priors from 2D video (human motion, robot motion), while this paper targets static scene geometry reconstruction (buildings, objects). The pain points in the profile mention "motion priors" and "motion output" - this paper reconstructs static scenes. Methods differ: profile uses Video Generation Models (Wanxiang, Seedance) and Motion Generation Models, while this paper uses Visual Foundation Models (VFM) for scene reconstruction. This is a completely different application domain within Computer Vision.

title: Stake the Points: Structure-Faithful Instance Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning (MU) addresses privacy risks in pretrained models. The main goal of MU is to remove the influence of designated data while preserving the utility of retained knowledge. Achieving this goal requires preserving semantic relations among retained instances, which existing studies often overlook. We observe that without such preservation, models suffer from progressive structural collapse, undermining both the deletion-retention balance. In this work, we propose a novel structure-faithful framework that introduces stakes, i.e., semantic anchors that serve as reference points to maintain the knowledge structure. By leveraging these anchors, our framework captures and stabilizes the semantic organization of knowledge. Specifically, we instantiate the anchors from language-driven attribute descriptions encoded by a semantic encoder (e.g., CLIP). We enforce preservation of the knowledge structure via structure-aware alignment and regularization: the former aligns the organization of retained knowledge before and after unlearning around anchors, while the latter regulates updates to structure-critical parameters. Results from image classification, retrieval, and face recognition show average gains of 32.9%, 22.5%, and 19.3% in performance, balancing the deletion-retention trade-off and enhancing generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文针对机器遗忘中忽略语义关系维护的问题，提出利用语义锚点（stakes）保持知识结构的框架，通过结构感知对齐和正则化技术，在图像分类、检索和人脸识别任务上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 机器学习中的隐私风险推动了对机器遗忘（MU）的研究。现有方法在删除指定数据影响时，往往忽视保留数据之间的语义关系维护，导致模型遭受渐进性结构崩溃，破坏了删除-保留平衡。
AI.method: 提出structure-faithful框架，利用stakes（语义锚点）作为参考点来维持知识结构。具体包括：1）从语言驱动的属性描述中实例化锚点，使用语义编码器（如CLIP）编码；2）通过structure-aware alignment（结构感知对齐）使遗忘前后的知识结构围绕锚点对齐；3）通过structure-aware regularization（结构感知正则化） регулируя更新结构关键参数。
AI.result: 在图像分类、检索和人脸识别三个任务上的实验表明，该方法分别实现了32.9%、22.5%和19.3%的平均性能提升，有效平衡了删除-保留权衡并增强了泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的structure-faithful框架通过引入stakes（语义锚点）有效解决了机器遗忘中的结构崩溃问题。实验表明该方法在图像分类、检索和人脸识别任务上分别获得32.9%、22.5%和19.3%的性能提升，成功平衡了删除-保留权衡并增强了模型的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Machine Unlearning (MU) - maintaining semantic relationships when deleting data from trained models. It has NOTHING to do with 3D motion generation from 2D video, Video Generation Models (Wanxiang/Seedance), Vision-Language Models for quality supervision in motion generation, or cross-modal alignment for motion representations. The application domain is completely different - this is about machine learning privacy, not computer graphics/computer vision motion generation.

title: AVION: Aerial Vision-Language Instruction from Offline Teacher to Prompt-Tuned Network
summary: Adapting vision-language models to remote sensing imagery remains challenging due to two key factors: limited semantic coverage in textual representations and insufficient adaptability of visual features. These issues are particularly significant in aerial scenes, which involve various visual appearances and fine-grained object distinctions. We propose AVION, a knowledge distillation framework tailored for remote sensing adaptation of vision-language models. The teacher module constructs semantically rich textual prototypes by collecting descriptions from a large language model and verifying validity using remote sensing image features. The student module integrates lightweight and learnable prompts into both vision and language encoders, guided by the teacher to align embeddings and their cross-modal relationships. Once trained, the student operates independently during inference. Experiments on six optical remote sensing benchmarks show that AVION improves few-shot classification and base-class accuracy without degrading generalization to novel categories. It also enhances mean recall for cross-modal retrieval, with minimal additional trainable parameters.

AI.tldr: AVION是一个用于遥感图像视觉-语言模型适应的知识蒸馏框架，通过教师模块构建语义丰富的文本原型，学生模块集成可学习提示对齐跨模态嵌入，在六个遥感数据集上提升了少样本分类和跨模态检索性能。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像的视觉-语言模型适应面临两大挑战：文本表示的语义覆盖不足和视觉特征的适应性不足。这些问题在航拍场景中尤为突出，因为场景视觉外观多样且物体细粒度区分复杂。
AI.method: 提出AVION框架，包含：(1)教师模块利用大语言模型收集描述并通过遥感图像特征验证，构建语义丰富的文本原型；(2)学生模块将轻量级可学习提示注入视觉和语言编码器，在教师指导下对齐嵌入及其跨模态关系；(3)推理时学生模块独立运行。
AI.result: 在六个光学遥感基准数据集上的实验表明：AVION提升了少样本分类和基类准确率，且未损害对新类别的泛化能力；同时增强了跨模态检索的平均召回率，且仅需极少的可训练参数。
AI.conclusion: AVION通过知识蒸馏有效解决了遥感图像领域中视觉-语言模型适应的两大挑战，在保持对新类别泛化能力的同时，显著提升了少样本分类和跨模态检索性能，且仅需极少的可训练参数。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about remote sensing image visual-language model adaptation for aerial imagery classification and retrieval, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics/Computer Vision for 3D motion generation from video content. Although both use Vision-Language Models, the application domain is entirely different - this addresses remote sensing, not 3D motion priors extraction or video-to-motion generation. The pain points, methods (video generation models, motion generation), and end goals are completely misaligned.

title: SAW: Toward a Surgical Action World Model via Controllable and Scalable Video Generation
summary: A surgical world model capable of generating realistic surgical action videos with precise control over tool-tissue interactions can address fundamental challenges in surgical AI and simulation -- from data scarcity and rare event synthesis to bridging the sim-to-real gap for surgical automation. However, current video generation methods, the very core of such surgical world models, require expensive annotations or complex structured intermediates as conditioning signals at inference, limiting their scalability. Other approaches exhibit limited temporal consistency across complex laparoscopic scenes and do not possess sufficient realism. We propose Surgical Action World (SAW) -- a step toward surgical action world modeling through video diffusion conditioned on four lightweight signals: language prompts encoding tool-action context, a reference surgical scene, tissue affordance mask, and 2D tool-tip trajectories. We design a conditional video diffusion approach that reformulates video-to-video diffusion into trajectory-conditioned surgical action synthesis. The backbone diffusion model is fine-tuned on a custom-curated dataset of 12,044 laparoscopic clips with lightweight spatiotemporal conditioning signals, leveraging a depth consistency loss to enforce geometric plausibility without requiring depth at inference. SAW achieves state-of-the-art temporal consistency (CD-FVD: 199.19 vs. 546.82) and strong visual quality on held-out test data. Furthermore, we demonstrate its downstream utility for (a) surgical AI, where augmenting rare actions with SAW-generated videos improves action recognition (clipping F1-score: 20.93% to 43.14%; cutting: 0.00% to 8.33%) on real test data, and (b) surgical simulation, where rendering tool-tissue interaction videos from simulator-derived trajectory points toward a visually faithful simulation engine.

AI.tldr: SAW是一个手术动作世界模型，通过视频扩散技术生成逼真的外科手术 action 视频，仅需四个轻量级条件信号：语言提示、参考手术场景、组织 affordance 掩码和2D工具尖端轨迹。
AI.motivation: 当前视频生成方法需要昂贵的标注或复杂的结构化中间条件信号，限制了可扩展性；其他方法在复杂腹腔镜场景中时间一致性有限，缺乏足够的真实感。手术世界模型可以解决外科AI和数据稀缺等基础挑战。
AI.method: 设计了一种条件视频扩散方法，将视频到视频扩散重新表述为轨迹条件的手术动作合成。骨干扩散模型在12,044个腹腔镜手术视频片段的数据集上进行微调，使用轻量级时空条件信号，并利用深度一致性损失来强制几何可行性，无需在推理时需要深度信息。
AI.result: SAW在保留测试数据上实现了最先进的时间一致性(CD-FVD: 199.19 vs. 546.82)和强大的视觉质量。在下游应用中：a)外科AI方面，使用SAW生成的视频增强稀有动作后，动作识别性能显著提升(剪辑F1: 20.93%→43.14%；切割: 0.00%→8.33%)；b)外科模拟方面，可从模拟器导出的轨迹点渲染工具-组织交互视频。
AI.conclusion: SAW通过轻量级条件信号实现了高质量手术视频生成，为外科AI数据增强和视觉保真模拟引擎提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: While this paper is in Computer Vision and uses video diffusion methods, the APPLICATION DOMAIN is completely different. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation (extracting 3D motion priors from 2D video, bridging 2D video to 3D motion output), whereas this paper focuses on SURGICAL VIDEO GENERATION - a medical domain application. The paper generates 2D surgical videos from trajectories, not 3D motion. It does not address VLM for quality supervision, does not produce 3D motion output, and the surgical domain is fundamentally different from human motion generation in computer graphics. This is a case of using similar methods (video diffusion) but in a completely different application domain (medical surgery vs. human motion graphics).

title: Vision Verification Enhanced Fusion of VLMs for Efficient Visual Reasoning
summary: With the growing number and diversity of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), many works explore language-based ensemble, collaboration, and routing techniques across multiple VLMs to improve multi-model reasoning. In contrast, we address the diverse model selection using both vision and language modalities. We introduce focal error diversity to capture complementary reasoning across VLMs and a CKA-based focal diversity metric (CKA-focal) to measure disagreement in their visual embeddings. On the constructed ensemble surface from a pool of candidate VLMs, we applied a Genetic Algorithm to effectively prune out those component VLMs that do not add value to the fusion performance. We identify the best combination for each task as well as fuse the outputs of each VLMs in the model pool, and show that heterogeneous models can capture epistemic uncertainty dynamically and mitigate hallucinations. Our V3Fusion approach is capable of producing dual focal-diversity fused predictions with high performance for vision-language reasoning, even when there is no majority consensus or the majority of VLMs make incorrect predictions. Extensive experiments validate V3Fusion on four popular VLM benchmarks (A-OKVQA, MMMU, MMMU-Pro, and OCR-VQA). The results show that V3Fusion outperforms the best-performing VLM on MMMU by 8.09% and MMMU-Pro by 4.87% gain in accuracy. For generative tasks, V3Fusion outperforms Intern-VL2-8b and Qwen2.5-VL-7b, the top-2 VLM performers on both A-OKVQA and OCR-VQA. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/sftekin/v3fusion.

AI.tldr: V3Fusion是一种基于视觉语言模型(VLM)集成的多模态推理框架，通过CKA焦散度度量评估模型在视觉嵌入上的分歧，并利用遗传算法剪枝无效模型，实现高效融合。在MMMU和MMMU-Pro基准上分别提升8.09%和4.87%准确率，同时在A-OKVQA和OCR-VQA生成任务上超越Intern-VL2-8b和Qwen2.5-VL-7b。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注基于语言的VLM集成，而本文旨在利用视觉和语言双重模态进行模型选择。通过引入焦散度(focial error diversity)来捕捉VLM之间的互补推理能力，解决多模型推理中的模型选择和路由问题。
AI.method: 1)提出CKA焦散度度量(CKA-focal)衡量模型在视觉嵌入上的分歧；2)构建候选VLM池的集成表面；3)应用遗传算法有效剪枝不增值的组件VLM；4)为每个任务识别最佳组合并融合输出，实现双焦散度融合预测。
AI.result: 在四个VLM基准(A-OKVQA、MMMU、MMMU-Pro、OCR-VQA)上验证：MMMU提升8.09%，MMMU-Pro提升4.87%；生成任务上超越Intern-VL2-8b和Qwen2.5-VL-7b。即使无多数共识或多数模型错误时仍保持高性能，并能动态捕捉认知不确定性、减少幻觉。
AI.conclusion: V3Fusion能够产生高性能的双焦散度融合预测，有效处理无多数共识场景和多数模型错误情况，通过动态捕捉认知不确定性减轻幻觉问题，为视觉语言推理提供了一种有效的异构模型集成方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on VLM ensemble fusion for general visual reasoning tasks (VQA, visual question answering), which is a different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from 2D video. While both mention Vision-Language Models, the research profile specifically needs VLMs for quality supervision in 3D motion generation (e.g., filtering generated motion, cross-modal alignment for motion), not for visual reasoning or VQA tasks. The paper addresses general visual reasoning benchmarks (MMMU, A-OKVQA), not motion generation, video-to-3D conversion, or computer graphics motion priors.

title: SortScrews: A Dataset and Baseline for Real-time Screw Classification
summary:
Automatic identification of screw types is important for industrial automation, robotics, and inventory management. However, publicly available datasets for screw classification are scarce, particularly for controlled single-object scenarios commonly encountered in automated sorting systems. In this work, we introduce $\textbf{SortScrews}$, a dataset for casewise visual classification of screws. The dataset contains 560 RGB images at $512\times512$ resolution covering six screw types and a background class. Images are captured using a standardized acquisition setup and include mild variations in lighting and camera perspective across four capture settings.
  To facilitate reproducible research and dataset expansion, we also provide a reusable data collection script that allows users to easily construct similar datasets for custom hardware components using inexpensive camera setups.
  We establish baseline results using transfer learning with EfficientNet-B0 and ResNet-18 classifiers pretrained on ImageNet. In addition, we conduct a well-explored failure analysis. Despite the limited dataset size, these lightweight models achieve strong classification accuracy, demonstrating that controlled acquisition conditions enable effective learning even with relatively small datasets. The dataset, collection pipeline, and baseline training code are publicly available at https://github.com/ATATC/SortScrews.

AI.tldr: SortScrews是一个用于逐个视觉分类螺丝的数据集，包含560张512×512分辨率的RGB图像，涵盖6种螺丝类型和1个背景类，使用标准化采集设置拍摄。基线实验表明，尽管数据集规模有限，预训练模型通过迁移学习仍能取得良好的分类效果。
AI.motivation: 公开可用的螺丝分类数据集稀缺，特别是在自动化分拣系统中常见的受控单目标场景，因此需要建立专门的螺丝分类数据集。
AI.method: 使用ImageNet预训练的EfficientNet-B0和ResNet-18进行迁移学习，并对分类失败进行了详细分析。
AI.result: 轻量级模型在有限数据集上实现了较强的分类准确率，证明了受控采集条件下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SortScrews数据集在有限规模下仍能达到较高的分类准确率，表明受控的采集条件能够支持有效的学习，即使在相对较小的数据集上也能取得良好效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about screw classification for industrial automation, which is completely unrelated to the research profile about 3D motion generation from 2D video. The application domains are entirely different: the profile focuses on video-to-3D motion extraction, video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), VLMs for quality supervision, and cross-modal alignment, while this paper uses image classification (EfficientNet-B0, ResNet-18) for classifying screws in a controlled industrial setting. The methods, pain points, and goals have no overlap whatsoever.

title: Team RAS in 10th ABAW Competition: Multimodal Valence and Arousal Estimation Approach
summary: Continuous emotion recognition in terms of valence and arousal under in-the-wild (ITW) conditions remains a challenging problem due to large variations in appearance, head pose, illumination, occlusions, and subject-specific patterns of affective expression. We present a multimodal method for valence-arousal estimation ITW. Our method combines three complementary modalities: face, behavior, and audio. The face modality relies on GRADA-based frame-level embeddings and Transformer-based temporal regression. We use Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct to extract behavior-relevant information from video segments, while Mamba is used to model temporal dynamics across segments. The audio modality relies on WavLM-Large with attention-statistics pooling and includes a cross-modal filtering stage to reduce the influence of unreliable or non-speech segments. To fuse modalities, we explore two fusion strategies: a Directed Cross-Modal Mixture-of-Experts Fusion Strategy that learns interactions between modalities with adaptive weighting, and a Reliability-Aware Audio-Visual Fusion Strategy that combines visual features at the frame-level while using audio as complementary context. The results are reported on the Aff-Wild2 dataset following the 10th Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-Wild (ABAW) challenge protocol. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed multimodal fusion strategy achieves a Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) of 0.658 on the Aff-Wild2 development set.

AI.tldr: 提出一种ITW条件下多模态 valence-arousal估计方法，融合面部、行为和音频三个互补模态，采用Directed Cross-Modal MoE和Reliability-Aware融合策略，在Aff-Wild2数据集上CCC达到0.658
AI.motivation: ITW条件下连续情绪效价-唤醒度估计面临外观、头部姿态、光照、遮挡及个体表达差异等巨大挑战
AI.method: 1) 面部模态：GRADA帧级嵌入+Transformer时序回归；2) 行为模态：Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct提取视频片段信息+Mamba建模跨片段时序动态；3) 音频模态：WavLM-Large+注意力统计池化+跨模态滤波；4) 融合策略： Directed Cross-Modal MoE融合+Reliability-Aware视听融合
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2开发集上达到CCC=0.658
AI.conclusion: 在Aff-Wild2开发集上，多模态融合策略实现了0.658的CCC值，验证了所提方法的有效性

relevance_reason: The paper is about multimodal valence-arousal estimation (emotion recognition) from facial, behavioral, and audio modalities. This is in the domain of affective computing, NOT Computer Graphics/Computer Vision for 3D motion generation. The research profile specifically focuses on extracting 3D motion priors from 2D video, video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), quality control via VLMs for motion generation, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion output. While the paper uses some similar methods (VLM like Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct, Transformers), they are applied to a completely different application domain - emotion recognition rather than 3D motion generation or video generation. This is a fundamental mismatch in application domain.

title: STRAP-ViT: Segregated Tokens with Randomized -- Transformations for Defense against Adversarial Patches in ViTs
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE/ACM Design Automation Conference (DAC) 2026
summary: Adversarial patches are physically realizable localized noise, which are able to hijack Vision Transformers (ViT) self-attention, pulling focus toward a small, high-contrast region and corrupting the class token to force confident misclassifications. In this paper, we claim that the tokens which correspond to the areas of the image that contain the adversarial noise, have different statistical properties when compared to the tokens which do not overlap with the adversarial perturbations. We use this insight to propose a mechanism, called STRAP-ViT, which uses Jensen-Shannon Divergence as a metric for segregating tokens that behave as anomalies in the Detection Phase, and then apply randomized composite transformations on them during the Mitigation Phase to make the adversarial noise ineffective. The minimum number of tokens to transform is a hyper-parameter for the defense mechanism and is chosen such that at least 50% of the patch is covered by the transformed tokens. STRAP-ViT fits as a non-trainable plug-and-play block within the ViT architectures, for inference purposes only, with a minimal computational cost and does not require any additional training cost/effort. STRAP-ViT has been tested on multiple pre-trained vision transformer architectures (ViT-base-16 and DinoV2) and datasets (ImageNet and CalTech-101), across multiple adversarial attacks (Adversarial Patch, LAVAN, GDPA and RP2), and found to provide excellent robust accuracies lying within a 2-3% range of the clean baselines, and outperform the state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: 提出STRAP-ViT，利用Jensen-Shannon散度检测对抗补丁影响的异常token，并通过随机复合变换减轻攻击，无需训练即可作为即插即用模块提升ViT对对抗补丁的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗补丁可以劫持Vision Transformers的自注意力机制，通过高对比度区域吸引注意力并腐蚀class token导致错误分类。作者发现包含对抗噪声的token与正常token具有不同的统计特性，这为防御提供了理论基础。
AI.method: 提出两阶段防御机制：(1)检测阶段使用Jensen-Shannon散度识别行为异常的token；(2)缓解阶段对这些token应用随机复合变换使对抗噪声失效。转换的最小token数量设为能覆盖至少50%补丁的区域。该方法作为非可训练即插即用模块集成到ViT架构中，仅用于推理，计算开销极小且无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在ViT-base-16和DinoV2架构、ImageNet和CalTech-101数据集上，针对Adversarial Patch、LAVAN、GDPA和RP2等多种对抗攻击进行测试，鲁棒准确率保持在干净基线的2-3%范围内，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: STRAP-ViT通过利用token统计特性差异实现对抗补丁防御，无需训练即可部署，为ViT架构提供了一种高效实用的鲁棒性提升方案，在多种架构和数据集上展现优异性能。

relevance_reason: The paper is about adversarial defense for Vision Transformers (image classification robustness), which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on 3D motion generation from 2D video, video generation models, and cross-modal alignment between visual features and motion representations. The application domain is entirely different - this paper addresses security/robustness in image classification, not 3D motion/video generation. The methods (Jensen-Shannon散度 for adversarial token detection) also have no relevance to the target methods (video generation models, VLM for quality supervision, 3D motion generation).

title: Geometry-Guided Camera Motion Understanding in VideoLLMs
summary: Camera motion is a fundamental geometric signal that shapes visual perception and cinematic style, yet current video-capable vision-language models (VideoLLMs) rarely represent it explicitly and often fail on fine-grained motion primitives. We address this gap with a framework of $\textbf{benchmarking}$, $\textbf{diagnosis}$, and $\textbf{injection}$. We curate $\textbf{CameraMotionDataset}$, a large-scale synthetic dataset with explicit camera control, formulate camera motion as constraint-aware multi-label recognition, and construct a VQA benchmark--$\textbf{CameraMotionVQA}$. Across diverse off-the-shelf VideoLLMs, we observe substantial errors in recognizing camera motion primitives. Probing experiments on a Qwen2.5-VL vision encoder suggest that camera motion cues are weakly represented, especially in deeper ViT blocks, helping explain the observed failure modes. To bridge this gap without costly training or fine-tuning, we propose a lightweight, model-agnostic pipeline that extracts geometric camera cues from 3D foundation models (3DFMs), predicts constrained motion primitives with a temporal classifier, and injects them into downstream VideoLLM inference via structured prompting. Experiments demonstrate improved motion recognition and more camera-aware model responses, highlighting geometry-driven cue extraction and structured prompting as practical steps toward a camera-aware VideoLLM and VLA system. The dataset and benchmark is publicly available at https://hf.co/datasets/fengyee/camera-motion-dataset-and-benchmark.

AI.tldr: 针对VideoLLM相机运动识别能力不足的问题，构建了数据集和基准进行诊断，发现视觉编码器对相机运动线索表示薄弱，提出利用3D基础模型提取几何线索并通过结构化提示注入的轻量级解决方案。
AI.motivation: 当前视频视觉语言模型(VideoLLM)很少显式表示相机运动信号，在细粒度运动基元识别上经常失败。相机运动是塑造视觉感知和电影风格的基本几何信号，但现有模型缺乏对这一重要信号的建模能力。
AI.method: 构建了三大模块：1)基准测试：创建CameraMotionDataset大规模合成数据集和CameraMotionVQA问答基准；2)诊断：对Qwen2.5-VL视觉编码器进行探针实验，发现相机运动线索表示薄弱；3)注入：提出轻量级模型无关管道，从3D基础模型提取几何线索，用时序分类器预测约束运动基元，通过结构化提示注入下游推理。
AI.result: 实验表明：1)多种现成VideoLLM在相机运动识别上存在显著错误；2)相机运动线索在视觉编码器中表示较弱，尤其在深层ViT块中；3)提出的方法改善了运动识别和相机感知响应。
AI.conclusion: 几何驱动的线索提取和结构化提示是实现相机感知VideoLLM和VLA系统的实用步骤，无需昂贵训练或微调。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on camera motion UNDERSTANDING and recognition in VideoLLMs (diagnosing VideoLLMs' ability to recognize camera motion), while the research profile is about 3D MOTION GENERATION from 2D video. These are fundamentally different tasks: recognition vs. generation. The paper doesn't address extracting 3D motion priors for generation, quality control in motion generation, or cross-modal alignment for creating motion outputs. Although both deal with video/motion in computer vision, the application domain is different - this paper is about motion analysis/recognition, not motion generation.

title: Visual-ERM: Reward Modeling for Visual Equivalence
summary: Vision-to-code tasks require models to reconstruct structured visual inputs, such as charts, tables, and SVGs, into executable or structured representations with high visual fidelity. While recent Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) achieve strong results via supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning remains challenging due to misaligned reward signals. Existing rewards either rely on textual rules or coarse visual embedding similarity, both of which fail to capture fine-grained visual discrepancies and are vulnerable to reward hacking. We propose Visual Equivalence Reward Model (Visual-ERM), a multimodal generative reward model that provides fine-grained, interpretable, and task-agnostic feedback to evaluate vision-to-code quality directly in the rendered visual space. Integrated into RL, Visual-ERM improves Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct by +8.4 on chart-to-code and yields consistent gains on table and SVG parsing (+2.7, +4.1 on average), and further strengthens test-time scaling via reflection and revision. We also introduce VisualCritic-RewardBench (VC-RewardBench), a benchmark for judging fine-grained image-to-image discrepancies on structured visual data, where Visual-ERM at 8B decisively outperforms Qwen3-VL-235B-Instruct and approaches leading closed-source models. Our results suggest that fine-grained visual reward supervision is both necessary and sufficient for vision-to-code RL, regardless of task specificity.

AI.tldr: 针对视觉到代码强化学习中的奖励信号不对齐问题，提出Visual-ERM多模态生成式奖励模型，能够在渲染视觉空间中提供细粒度反馈，显著提升图表、表格和SVG解析任务效果，并在VC-RewardBench基准上以小参数模型超越大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉到代码任务的强化学习方法面临奖励信号不对齐的问题：现有奖励要么依赖文本规则，要么依赖粗粒度的视觉嵌入相似度，两者都无法捕捉细粒度的视觉差异，且容易受到奖励黑客攻击。
AI.method: 提出Visual-ERM（视觉等价奖励模型），一个多模态生成式奖励模型，直接在渲染视觉空间中评估视觉到代码质量，提供细粒度、可解释的任务无关反馈，并将其集成到强化学习流程中。
AI.result: 1. Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct在图表到代码任务上提升+8.4分；2. 表格和SVG解析任务平均提升+2.7和+4.1分；3. 通过反思和修订进一步增强了测试时扩展；4. 在VC-RewardBench基准上，8B参数的Visual-ERM性能超越Qwen3-VL-235B-Instruct，接近领先的闭源模型。
AI.conclusion: Visual-ERM作为一种多模态生成式奖励模型，通过在渲染视觉空间中提供细粒度、可解释且任务无关的反馈，有效解决了视觉到代码强化学习中的奖励信号对齐问题。实验表明，该方法在图表、表格和SVG解析任务上均取得显著提升，且在VC-RewardBench基准测试中以8B参数超越了235B参数的模型，验证了细粒度视觉奖励监督的必要性和充分性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual-to-code tasks (chart/table/SVG generation from visual inputs), which is completely different from the research profile focused on 3D motion generation from 2D videos. While both involve Vision-Language Models, the application domain is entirely different: the profile deals with temporal motion/pose generation, while this paper deals with static code generation from visual inputs. The pain points are also unrelated - this paper addresses reward modeling for visual equivalence, not extracting 3D motion priors from video or cross-modal alignment for motion representations.

title: VCBench: A Streaming Counting Benchmark for Spatial-Temporal State Maintenance in Long Videos
summary: Video understanding requires models to continuously track and update world state during playback. While existing benchmarks have advanced video understanding evaluation across multiple dimensions, the observation of how models maintain world state remains insufficient. We propose VCBench, a streaming counting benchmark that repositions counting as a minimal probe for diagnosing world state maintenance capability. We decompose this capability into object counting (tracking currently visible objects vs.\ tracking cumulative unique identities) and event counting (detecting instantaneous actions vs.\ tracking complete activity cycles), forming 8 fine-grained subcategories. VCBench contains 406 videos with frame-by-frame annotations of 10,071 event occurrence moments and object state change moments, generating 1,000 streaming QA pairs with 4,576 query points along timelines. By observing state maintenance trajectories through streaming multi-point queries, we design three complementary metrics to diagnose numerical precision, trajectory consistency, and temporal awareness. Evaluation on mainstream video-language models shows that current models still exhibit significant deficiencies in spatial-temporal state maintenance, particularly struggling with tasks like periodic event counting. VCBench provides a diagnostic framework for measuring and improving state maintenance in video understanding systems.

AI.tldr: VCBench是一个流式计数基准，将计数作为诊断视频模型世界状态维护能力的最小化探针，包含406个视频、10071个事件标注和1000个问答对，形成8个细粒度子类别，揭示了当前模型在状态维护方面的显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解基准虽在多个维度取得进展，但对模型如何维护世界状态的观察仍然不足。需要一个能够诊断模型世界状态维护能力的最小化探针。
AI.method: 将计数能力分解为对象计数（追踪当前可见对象 vs 追踪累计唯一标识）和事件计数（检测瞬时动作 vs 追踪完整活动周期），形成8个细粒度子类别。通过流式多点查询观察状态维护轨迹，设计了三个互补指标：数值精度、轨迹一致性和时间感知能力。
AI.result: 评估主流视频语言模型显示，当前模型在时空状态维护方面仍存在显著缺陷，尤其在周期性事件计数等任务上表现困难。
AI.conclusion: VCBench为视频理解系统中的状态维护能力提供了诊断框架，揭示了当前主流视频语言模型在时空状态维护方面的显著缺陷，特别是在周期性事件计数任务上表现不佳。该基准有助于衡量和改进视频理解系统的状态维护能力。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D video content (Computer Graphics), while this paper is about video understanding benchmarks for evaluating VLMs on counting tasks and world state maintenance. Even though both involve video, VCBench is about video comprehension/evaluation, not motion generation, 3D priors extraction, or visual synthesis. The methods (VLM evaluation for counting) do not align with the required methods (video generation models, 3D motion generation models).

title: HFP-SAM: Hierarchical Frequency Prompted SAM for Efficient Marine Animal Segmentation
comment: Accepted by TIP2026. More modifications may be performed
summary: Marine Animal Segmentation (MAS) aims at identifying and segmenting marine animals from complex marine environments. Most of previous deep learning-based MAS methods struggle with the long-distance modeling issue. Recently, Segment Anything Model (SAM) has gained popularity in general image segmentation. However, it lacks of perceiving fine-grained details and frequency information. To this end, we propose a novel learning framework, named Hierarchical Frequency Prompted SAM (HFP-SAM) for high-performance MAS. First, we design a Frequency Guided Adapter (FGA) to efficiently inject marine scene information into the frozen SAM backbone through frequency domain prior masks. Additionally, we introduce a Frequency-aware Point Selection (FPS) to generate highlighted regions through frequency analysis. These regions are combined with the coarse predictions of SAM to generate point prompts and integrate into SAM's decoder for fine predictions. Finally, to obtain comprehensive segmentation masks, we introduce a Full-View Mamba (FVM) to efficiently extract spatial and channel contextual information with linear computational complexity. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our approach. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Drchip61/TIP-HFP-SAM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HFP-SAM框架，用于高性能海洋动物分割。针对SAM在细粒度细节和频率信息感知方面的不足，设计了频率引导适配器(FGA)、频率感知点选择(FPS)和全视角Mamba(FVM)三个模块，在4个公开数据集上验证了优越性能。
AI.motivation: 海洋动物分割任务面临复杂海洋环境和长距离建模挑战。现有深度学习方法在此方面表现不足，而新兴的SAM虽在通用分割表现出色，但缺乏细粒度细节和频率信息感知能力。
AI.method: 提出层次化频率提示SAM框架，包含三大创新：1)频率引导适配器(FGA)通过频域先验掩码将海洋场景信息注入冻结的SAM主干；2)频率感知点选(FPS)通过频域分析生成高亮区域，与SAM粗预测结合生成点提示；3)全视角Mamba(FVM)以线性复杂度提取空间和通道上下文信息。
AI.result: 在4个公开数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HFP-SAM在海洋动物分割任务上实现了优越性能，代码已开源。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D marine animal image segmentation using SAM, which is completely unrelated to the research profile about 3D motion generation from 2D video. The application domains are entirely different: the profile focuses on video-to-3D motion conversion, quality control via VLMs, and cross-modal alignment, while this paper addresses 2D image segmentation tasks. Although both fields are in Computer Vision, the specific application (segmentation vs. motion generation) and methodology (SAM-based segmentation vs. video generation/diffusion models) have no meaningful overlap. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points about extracting 3D motion priors, VLM quality supervision, or 2D-to-3D motion conversion.

title: Text-Phase Synergy Network with Dual Priors for Unsupervised Cross-Domain Image Retrieval
summary: This paper studies unsupervised cross-domain image retrieval (UCDIR), which aims to retrieve images of the same category across different domains without relying on labeled data. Existing methods typically utilize pseudo-labels, derived from clustering algorithms, as supervisory signals for intra-domain representation learning and cross-domain feature alignment. However, these discrete pseudo-labels often fail to provide accurate and comprehensive semantic guidance. Moreover, the alignment process frequently overlooks the entanglement between domain-specific and semantic information, leading to semantic degradation in the learned representations and ultimately impairing retrieval performance. This paper addresses the limitations by proposing a Text-Phase Synergy Network with Dual Priors(TPSNet). Specifically, we first employ CLIP to generate a set of class-specific prompts per domain, termed as domain prompt, serving as a text prior that offers more precise semantic supervision. In parallel, we further introduce a phase prior, represented by domain-invariant phase features, which is integrated into the original image representations to bridge the domain distribution gaps while preserving semantic integrity. Leveraging the synergy of these dual priors, TPSNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on UCDIR benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究无监督跨域图像检索问题，针对现有方法中伪标签语义指导不准确、域对齐忽视信息纠缠导致语义退化的问题，提出TPSNet方法。该方法通过CLIP生成的文本先验和域不变相位特征构成的相位先验双重协同，在保持语义完整性的同时实现跨域对齐，实验表明其性能大幅超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 无监督跨域图像检索（UCDIR）旨在不依赖标注数据的情况下检索跨域的同类图像。现存方法通常使用聚类算法产生的伪标签作为监督信号，但这些离散的伪标签难以提供准确、全面的语义指导。此外，对齐过程往往忽视域特定信息和语义信息之间的纠缠，导致学习到的表示出现语义退化，最终损害检索性能。
AI.method: 提出Text-Phase Synergy Network with Dual Priors (TPSNet)。具体包括：1）利用CLIP为每个域生成类特定提示（域提示），作为文本先验提供更精确的语义监督；2）引入相位先验（域不变相位特征），将其集成到原始图像表示中，在保持语义完整性的同时弥合域分布差距；3）利用双重先验的协同作用进行跨域对齐。
AI.result: 在UCDIR基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入文本先验（CLIP生成的域提示）和相位先验（域不变相位特征）的协同机制，TPSNet有效解决了传统方法中语义退化的问题，为无监督跨域图像检索提供了一种新的有效框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D image retrieval across domains, while the research profile is about extracting 3D motion priors from 2D video content. The application domains are completely different - one deals with cross-domain image matching (sketch-to-photo style), the other deals with video-to-3D motion generation. Although both use CLIP, the purpose and output are entirely different: image retrieval vs 3D motion generation. The pain points addressed are also unrelated - this paper focuses on semantic preservation in image retrieval, not on 3D motion extraction or video-to-motion conversion.

title: UNIStainNet: Foundation-Model-Guided Virtual Staining of H&E to IHC
summary: Virtual immunohistochemistry (IHC) staining from hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) images can accelerate diagnostics by providing preliminary molecular insight directly from routine sections, reducing the need for repeat sectioning when tissue is limited. Existing methods improve realism through contrastive objectives, prototype matching, or domain alignment, yet the generator itself receives no direct guidance from pathology foundation models. We present UNIStainNet, a SPADE-UNet conditioned on dense spatial tokens from a frozen pathology foundation model (UNI), providing tissue-level semantic guidance for stain translation. A misalignment-aware loss suite preserves stain quantification accuracy, and learned stain embeddings enable a single model to serve multiple IHC markers simultaneously. On MIST, UNIStainNet achieves state-of-the-art distributional metrics on all four stains (HER2, Ki67, ER, PR) from a single unified model, where prior methods typically train separate per-stain models. On BCI, it also achieves the best distributional metrics. A tissue-type stratified failure analysis reveals that remaining errors are systematic, concentrating in non-tumor tissue. Code is available at https://github.com/facevoid/UNIStainNet.

AI.tldr: UNIStainNet利用病理基础模型UNI的密集空间tokens作为条件，指导SPADE-UNet进行H&E到IHC的虚拟染色转换，通过错位感知损失和染色嵌入实现单一模型处理多种染色标记，在MIST和BCI数据集上达到最先进的分布指标。
AI.motivation: 从H&E图像虚拟生成免疫组化(IHC)染色可以在组织有限时减少重复切片，加速诊断并提供初步的分子信息。现有方法通过对比学习、原型匹配或域对齐提高真实感，但生成器本身未获得病理基础模型的直接指导。
AI.method: 提出UNIStainNet，一个SPADE-UNet，以冻结的病理基础模型(UNI)的密集空间 tokens为条件，提供组织级语义指导用于染色转换。采用错位感知损失套件保持染色量化准确性，并使用学习的染色嵌入使单个模型能够同时服务于多个IHC标记物。
AI.result: 在MIST数据集上，UNIStainNet在所有四种染色(HER2、Ki67、ER、PR)上实现最先进的分布指标，且来自单一统一模型(先前方法通常训练单独的per-stain模型)。在BCI上也实现最佳分布指标。组织类型分层的失败分析表明剩余错误是系统性的，集中于非肿瘤组织。
AI.conclusion: 成功利用基础模型为染色转换提供组织级语义指导，以统一模型实现多个染色的最先进性能，剩余错误主要存在于非肿瘤组织中。

relevance_reason: The paper is about virtual staining in digital pathology (medical imaging), converting H&E images to IHC stains. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D video content using video generation models and VLMs. Even though both are in "computer vision" broadly, the application domains are entirely different: medical pathology image translation vs. human motion/video generation. The methods (SPADE-UNet with pathology foundation model vs. video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance for motion generation) are also different and address completely different pain points.

title: The COTe score: A decomposable framework for evaluating Document Layout Analysis models
summary: Document Layout analysis (DLA), is the process by which a page is parsed into meaningful elements, often using machine learning models. Typically, the quality of a model is judged using general object detection metrics such as IoU, F1 or mAP. However, these metrics are designed for images that are 2D projections of 3D space, not for the natively 2D imagery of printed media. This discrepancy can result in misleading or uninformative interpretation of model performance by the metrics. To encourage more robust, comparable, and nuanced DLA, we introduce: The Structural Semantic Unit (SSU) a relational labelling approach that shifts the focus from the physical to the semantic structure of the content; and the Coverage, Overlap, Trespass, and Excess (COTe) score, a decomposable metric for measuring page parsing quality. We demonstrate the value of these methods through case studies and by evaluating 5 common DLA models on 3 DLA datasets. We show that the COTe score is more informative than traditional metrics and reveals distinct failure modes across models, such as breaching semantic boundaries or repeatedly parsing the same region. In addition, the COTe score reduces the interpretation-performance gap by up to 76% relative to the F1. Notably, we find that the COTe's granularity robustness largely holds even without explicit SSU labelling, lowering the barriers to entry for using the system. Finally, we release an SSU labelled dataset and a Python library for applying COTe in DLA projects.

AI.tldr: 针对文档布局分析(DLA)现有评估指标的局限性，提出结构语义单元(SSU)标注方法和COTe评分体系，以更准确地衡量页面解析质量。
AI.motivation: 当前DLA模型评估使用的IoU、F1、mAP等指标原本设计用于2D投影的3D空间图像，而非原生2D印刷媒体，导致模型性能评估可能产生误导性或不准确的解读。
AI.method: 提出结构语义单元(SSU)关系标注方法，将重点从物理结构转向语义结构；提出覆盖、重叠、侵入和过剩(COTe)评分，这是一个可分解的页面解析质量度量标准。
AI.result: COTe评分比传统指标更具信息量，能揭示模型的独特失败模式（如语义边界突破、重复解析同一区域）；相对F1将解释-性能差距减少76%；即使没有显式SSU标注也能保持良好的细粒度鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: COTe评分比传统指标更具信息量，能揭示模型的不同失败模式，即使在没有显式SSU标注的情况下也能保持鲁棒性，有效缩小了解释-性能差距。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Document Layout Analysis (DLA) - analyzing 2D document structures, PDFs, and printed materials. While it is a Computer Vision topic, the application domain is completely different from the research profile which focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D video content. The methods (SSU annotation, COTe scoring) have no relevance to video generation models, Vision-Language Models for motion quality supervision, or 3D motion generation. This is essentially two completely different application domains within Computer Vision - document analysis vs. video/motion understanding.

title: Thinking in Dynamics: How Multimodal Large Language Models Perceive, Track, and Reason Dynamics in Physical 4D World
summary: Humans inhabit a physical 4D world where geometric structure and semantic content evolve over time, constituting a dynamic 4D reality (spatial with temporal dimension). While current Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in static visual understanding, can they also be adept at "thinking in dynamics", i.e., perceive, track and reason about spatio-temporal dynamics in evolving scenes? To systematically assess their spatio-temporal reasoning and localized dynamics perception capabilities, we introduce Dyn-Bench, a large-scale benchmark built from diverse real-world and synthetic video datasets, enabling robust and scalable evaluation of spatio-temporal understanding. Through multi-stage filtering from massive 2D and 4D data sources, Dyn-Bench provides a high-quality collection of dynamic scenes, comprising 1k videos, 7k visual question answering (VQA) pairs, and 3k dynamic object grounding pairs. We probe general, spatial and region-level MLLMs to express how they think in dynamics both linguistically and visually, and find that existing models cannot simultaneously maintain strong performance in both spatio-temporal reasoning and dynamic object grounding, often producing inconsistent interpretations of motion and interaction. Notably, conventional prompting strategies (e.g., chain-of-thought or caption-based hints) provide limited improvement, whereas structured integration approaches, including Mask-Guided Fusion and Spatio-Temporal Textual Cognitive Map (ST-TCM), significantly enhance MLLMs' dynamics perception and spatio-temporal reasoning in the physical 4D world. Code and benchmark are available at https://dyn-bench.github.io/.

AI.tldr: Dyn-Bench是一个用于评估多模态大语言模型时空推理能力的大规模基准,包含1k视频、7k VQA对和3k动态目标定位对。研究发现现有模型难以同时具备时空推理和动态目标定位能力,而结构化整合方法可显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 当前MLLMs在静态视觉理解方面表现出色,但在"动态思考"能力上存在不足,即在 evolving scenes 中感知、跟踪和推理时空动态的能力尚未得到系统评估
AI.method: 构建Dyn-Bench基准（包含1k视频、7k VQA对、3k动态目标定位对）; 对通用型、空间型和区域级MLLMs进行多阶段评估; 测试链式思考和caption-based提示等传统策略; 验证Mask-Guided Fusion和ST-TCM结构化整合方法
AI.result: 现有模型无法同时保持时空推理和动态目标定位的强性能,常产生运动和交互的不一致解释; 传统提示策略改进有限; 结构化整合方法可显著增强MLLMs的动态感知和时空推理
AI.conclusion: 现有模型难以同时在时空推理和动态目标定位方面保持 strong performance; 传统提示策略改进有限; Mask-Guided Fusion和ST-TCM等结构化整合方法可显著提升MLLMs的动态感知和时空推理能力

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on evaluating multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for temporal-spatial reasoning, VQA, and object tracking in videos - which is fundamentally about video understanding/reasoning in the computer vision domain. However, the research profile is about Computer Graphics focused on 3D MOTION GENERATION from 2D video, including video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), using VLMs for quality supervision, and extracting 3D motion priors. The application domains are DIFFERENT: video understanding vs. motion generation. The paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points (extracting 3D motion priors, quality control via VLM, cross-modal alignment for motion, or 2D-to-3D motion output). While both involve video, this is a computer vision reasoning benchmark paper, not a computer graphics motion generation paper.

title: SLICE: Semantic Latent Injection via Compartmentalized Embedding for Image Watermarking
summary: Watermarking the initial noise of diffusion models has emerged as a promising approach for image provenance, but content-independent noise patterns can be forged via inversion and regeneration attacks. Recent semantic-aware watermarking methods improve robustness by conditioning verification on image semantics. However, their reliance on a single global semantic binding makes them vulnerable to localized but globally coherent semantic edits. To address this limitation and provide a trustworthy semantic-aware watermark, we propose $\underline{\textbf{S}}$emantic $\underline{\textbf{L}}$atent $\underline{\textbf{I}}$njection via $\underline{\textbf{C}}$ompartmentalized $\underline{\textbf{E}}$mbedding ($\textbf{SLICE}$). Our framework decouples image semantics into four semantic factors (subject, environment, action, and detail) and precisely anchors them to distinct regions in the initial Gaussian noise. This fine-grained semantic binding enables advanced watermark verification where semantic tampering is detectable and localizable. We theoretically justify why SLICE enables robust and reliable tamper localization and provides statistical guarantees on false-accept rates. Experimental results demonstrate that SLICE significantly outperforms existing baselines against advanced semantic-guided regeneration attacks, substantially reducing attack success while preserving image quality and semantic fidelity. Overall, SLICE offers a practical, training-free provenance solution that is both fine-grained in diagnosis and robust to realistic adversarial manipulations.

AI.tldr: 针对扩散模型图像来源追踪的语义水印方法SLICE，通过将图像语义解耦为四个因子（主体、环境、动作、细节）并锚定到初始噪声的不同区域，实现细粒度的语义绑定和篡改定位。
AI.motivation: 现有语义感知水印方法依赖单一全局语义绑定，容易被局部但全局连贯的语义编辑攻击破解；需要更细粒度的语义绑定来实现可定位的篡改检测。
AI.method: 提出SLICE框架，将图像语义解耦为四个因子（subject, environment, action, detail），将每个语义因子精确锚定到初始高斯噪声的不同区域，实现细粒度的语义绑定。
AI.result: SLICE显著优于现有基线方法，有效抵抗语义引导的再生攻击，大幅降低攻击成功率，同时保持图像质量和语义保真度。
AI.conclusion: SLICE提供了一种无需训练的实用图像来源解决方案，具有细粒度诊断能力和对现实对抗性操作的鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: The paper is about IMAGE WATERMARKING using diffusion models, while the research profile is about 3D MOTION GENERATION from 2D video content. These are completely different application domains. The research profile specifically focuses on extracting 3D motion priors, motion generation models, and video generation for human motion - not image watermarking or security. Even though both use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different (image security vs. human motion generation), which is the most critical factor in relevance evaluation.

title: Show, Don't Tell: Detecting Novel Objects by Watching Human Videos
summary: How can a robot quickly identify and recognize new objects shown to it during a human demonstration? Existing closed-set object detectors frequently fail at this because the objects are out-of-distribution. While open-set detectors (e.g., VLMs) sometimes succeed, they often require expensive and tedious human-in-the-loop prompt engineering to uniquely recognize novel object instances. In this paper, we present a self-supervised system that eliminates the need for tedious language descriptions and expensive prompt engineering by training a bespoke object detector on an automatically created dataset, supervised by the human demonstration itself. In our approach, "Show, Don't Tell," we show the detector the specific objects of interest during the demonstration, rather than telling the detector about these objects via complex language descriptions. By bypassing language altogether, this paradigm enables us to quickly train bespoke detectors tailored to the relevant objects observed in human task demonstrations. We develop an integrated on-robot system to deploy our "Show, Don't Tell" paradigm of automatic dataset creation and novel object-detection on a real-world robot. Empirical results demonstrate that our pipeline significantly outperforms state-of-the-art detection and recognition methods for manipulated objects, leading to improved task completion for the robot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"Show, Don't Tell"自监督系统，让机器人通过观察人类演示自动创建数据集并训练定制目标检测器，从而快速识别新物体，无需语言描述或提示工程。
AI.motivation: 现有闭集目标检测器难以识别演示中的新物体（分布外），开集检测器虽可识别但需要昂贵且繁琐的人工提示工程来区分新物体实例。
AI.method: 开发集成了"Show, Don't Tell"范式的机器人系统，在人类任务演示中自动创建数据集并训练定制检测器，通过向检测器"展示"目标物体而非用语言"告知"来绕过语言依赖。
AI.result: 实验表明该pipeline在manipulated objects的检测和识别方面显著优于最先进方法，提升了机器人任务完成率。
AI.conclusion: 该范式无需语言描述和提示工程即可快速训练定制检测器，为机器人实时识别演示中新物体提供了有效解决方案。
