The research profile focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D video, video generation models, VLMs for quality supervision, and cross-modal alignment for motion representations. This paper addresses none of those pain points: it doesn't extract 3D motion priors, doesn't use VLMs for quality control, doesn't generate motion, and doesn't bridge 2D video to 3D motion output. While both are in computer vision, the application domains are completely different - robot object detection vs. 3D motion generation.

title: SAP: Segment Any 4K Panorama
summary: Promptable instance segmentation is widely adopted in embodied and AR systems, yet the performance of foundation models trained on perspective imagery often degrades on 360° panoramas. In this paper, we introduce Segment Any 4K Panorama (SAP), a foundation model for 4K high-resolution panoramic instance-level segmentation. We reformulate panoramic segmentation as fixed-trajectory perspective video segmentation, decomposing a panorama into overlapping perspective patches sampled along a continuous spherical traversal. This memory-aligned reformulation preserves native 4K resolution while restoring the smooth viewpoint transitions required for stable cross-view propagation. To enable large-scale supervision, we synthesize 183,440 4K-resolution panoramic images with instance segmentation labels using the InfiniGen engine. Trained under this trajectory-aligned paradigm, SAP generalizes effectively to real-world 360° images, achieving +17.2 zero-shot mIoU gain over vanilla SAM2 of different sizes on real-world 4K panorama benchmark.

AI.tldr: SAP是一个用于4K高分辨率全景实例分割的基础模型，通过将全景分割转化为固定轨迹的透视视频分割任务，在保留4K分辨率的同时恢复了视角转换的平滑性，并在零样本条件下相比SAM2提升17.2 mIoU。
AI.motivation: 当前在具身系统和AR系统中广泛采用的提示性实例分割，其在透视图像上训练的基础模型在360°全景图上性能通常会下降。
AI.method: 将全景分割重新定义为固定轨迹透视视频分割，将全景图分解为沿连续球面遍历采样的重叠透视 patches。该方法在保留4K原生分辨率的同时，恢复平滑视角转换所需的稳定性。
AI.result: 在真实世界4K全景图基准上，SAP相比不同规模的 vanilla SAM2 实现了 +17.2 的零样本 mIoU 提升。
AI.conclusion: SAP通过将全景分割重新定义为固定轨迹透视视频分割，成功解决了在4K高分辨率全景图像上进行实例分割的难题。该方法保留了原生4K分辨率，同时恢复了跨视图传播所需的平滑视角转换。通过大规模合成数据训练，SAP在真实世界360°图像上展现出良好的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 4K panoramic image instance segmentation (SAM2-based), which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on 3D motion generation from 2D video. The application domains are entirely different: panorama segmentation vs. motion priors extraction, video generation, and 2D-to-3D motion synthesis. None of the pain points (extracting 3D motion priors, VLM quality control, cross-modal alignment for motion) are addressed. The methods are also completely different - this uses SAM2 segmentation whereas the profile uses video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance) and 3D motion generation models.

title: HIFICL: High-Fidelity In-Context Learning for Multimodal Tasks
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/bbbandari/HiFICL
summary: In-Context Learning (ICL) is a significant paradigm for Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), using a few in-context demonstrations (ICDs) for new task adaptation. However, its performance is sensitive to demonstration configurations and computationally expensive. Mathematically, the influence of these demonstrations can be decomposed into a dynamic mixture of the standard attention output and the context values. Current approximation methods simplify this process by learning a "shift vector". Inspired by the exact decomposition, we introduce High-Fidelity In-Context Learning (HIFICL) to more faithfully model the ICL mechanism. HIFICL consists of three key components: 1) a set of "virtual key-value pairs" to act as a learnable context, 2) a low-rank factorization for stable and regularized training, and 3) a simple end-to-end training objective. From another perspective, this mechanism constitutes a form of context-aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT). Extensive experiments show that HiFICL consistently outperforms existing approximation methods on several multimodal benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/bbbandari/HiFICL.

AI.tldr: 针对大视觉语言模型的情境学习(ICL)性能敏感和计算昂贵问题，提出HiFICL方法，通过虚拟键值对、低秩分解和端到端训练来更准确地建模ICL机制，在多模态基准测试中取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 当前ICL方法对演示配置敏感且计算昂贵，现有近似方法通过学习"偏移向量"简化处理，但无法准确建模ICL机制的真实影响。
AI.method: 提出高保真上下文学习(HiFICL)方法，包含三个核心组件：1)虚拟键值对作为可学习上下文；2)低秩分解实现稳定正则化训练；3)简单端到端训练目标。从上下文感知参数高效微调角度建模ICL机制。
AI.result: 在多个多模态基准测试中一致优于现有近似方法
AI.conclusion: HiFICL通过虚拟键值对、低秩分解和端到端训练目标，在多个多模态基准测试中一致优于现有近似方法，验证了高保真ICL机制的有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses In-Context Learning (ICL) optimization for large vision-language models, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on 3D motion generation from 2D video. While both are in Computer Vision, the application domains are entirely different: the profile deals with motion/video generation and cross-modal alignment for 3D output, while this paper deals with general multimodal ICL mechanisms for benchmark tasks. The methods mentioned (video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLM for quality supervision, 3D motion generation) have no overlap with this paper's focus on virtual key-value pairs and low-rank decomposition for ICL. This is a classic case of same field but completely different application domain.

title: TerraFlow: Multimodal, Multitemporal Representation Learning for Earth Observation
summary: We propose TerraFlow, a novel approach to multimodal, multitemporal learning for Earth observation. TerraFlow builds on temporal training objectives that enable sequence-aware learning across space, time, and modality, while remaining robust to the variable-length inputs commonly encountered in real-world Earth observation data. Our experiments demonstrate superiority of TerraFlow over state-of-the-art foundation models for Earth observation across all temporal tasks of the GEO-Bench-2 benchmark. We additionally demonstrate that TerraFlow is able to make initial steps towards deep-learning based risk map prediction for natural disasters -- a task on which other state-of-the-art foundation models frequently collapse. TerraFlow outperforms state-of-the-art foundation models by up to 50% in F1 score and 24% in Brier score.

AI.tldr: TerraFlow是一种新型多模态多时间学习框架，通过时间训练目标实现序列感知学习，在GEO-Bench-2基准测试上超越现有最先进基础模型，并在自然灾害风险图预测任务上展现独特能力。
AI.motivation: 当前方法在处理真实世界地球观测数据中常见的可变长度输入时存在局限性，缺乏对空间、时间和模态的序列感知学习能力。
AI.method: TerraFlow建立在时间训练目标之上，能够在空间、时间和模态上进行序列感知学习，同时对真实世界地球观测数据中常见的可变长度输入保持鲁棒性。
AI.result: TerraFlow在GEO-Bench-2基准测试的所有时间任务上表现优于最先进的基础模型，并在自然灾害风险图预测方面取得初步进展，而其他最先进的基础模型经常在此任务上失败。
AI.conclusion: TerraFlow在F1分数上优于最先进的基础模型高达50%，在Brier分数上优于24%，标志着地球观测多模态多时间学习的重要进展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Earth Observation (satellite imagery, remote sensing) for natural disaster risk prediction, which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics/Computer Vision for 3D motion generation from video. While TerraFlow uses multimodal and temporal learning, its domain is remote sensing/geospatial analysis, not video-to-3D motion extraction, video generation, or visual-motion alignment as required in the research profile. This is a fundamental domain mismatch.

title: SAVA-X: Ego-to-Exo Imitation Error Detection via Scene-Adaptive View Alignment and Bidirectional Cross View Fusion
comment: This article was accepted by CVPR 2026
summary: Error detection is crucial in industrial training, healthcare, and assembly quality control. Most existing work assumes a single-view setting and cannot handle the practical case where a third-person (exo) demonstration is used to assess a first-person (ego) imitation. We formalize Ego$\rightarrow$Exo Imitation Error Detection: given asynchronous, length-mismatched ego and exo videos, the model must localize procedural steps on the ego timeline and decide whether each is erroneous. This setting introduces cross-view domain shift, temporal misalignment, and heavy redundancy. Under a unified protocol, we adapt strong baselines from dense video captioning and temporal action detection and show that they struggle in this cross-view regime. We then propose SAVA-X, an Align-Fuse-Detect framework with (i) view-conditioned adaptive sampling, (ii) scene-adaptive view embeddings, and (iii) bidirectional cross-attention fusion. On the EgoMe benchmark, SAVA-X consistently improves AUPRC and mean tIoU over all baselines, and ablations confirm the complementary benefits of its components. Code is available at https://github.com/jack1ee/SAVAX.

AI.tldr: 提出Ego→Exo模仿错误检测新任务，处理跨视角、异步、长度不匹配的视频。提出SAVA-X框架，通过视图条件自适应采样、场景自适应视图嵌入和双向交叉注意力融合解决领域迁移和时间对齐问题，在EgoMe基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设单视角设定，无法处理使用第三人称（外视角）演示来评估第一人称（内视角）模仿的实际场景。跨视角领域迁移、时间不对齐和大量冗余是关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出SAVA-X框架，包含三个核心组件：(i)视图条件自适应采样，(ii)场景自适应视图嵌入，(iii)双向交叉注意力融合
AI.result: SAVA-X在EgoMe基准上在AUPRC和mean tIoU上均优于所有基线方法
AI.conclusion: SAVA-X在EgoMe基准上显著优于所有基线方法，验证了各组件的互补优势。代码已开源。

relevance_reason: While this paper deals with cross-view human motion understanding (ego-to-exo), it focuses on imitation ERROR DETECTION rather than 3D motion generation from 2D video. The research profile specifically needs: (1) 3D motion priors extraction from 2D video, (2) Video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), (3) VLM for quality supervision, (4) Motion generation models. This paper addresses none of these - it's about detecting errors between first-person and third-person video views using view alignment techniques. The application domain is fundamentally different: error detection vs. motion generation.

title: Catalyst4D: High-Fidelity 3D-to-4D Scene Editing via Dynamic Propagation
summary: Recent advances in 3D scene editing using NeRF and 3DGS enable high-quality static scene editing. In contrast, dynamic scene editing remains challenging, as methods that directly extend 2D diffusion models to 4D often produce motion artifacts, temporal flickering, and inconsistent style propagation. We introduce Catalyst4D, a framework that transfers high-quality 3D edits to dynamic 4D Gaussian scenes while maintaining spatial and temporal coherence. At its core, Anchor-based Motion Guidance (AMG) builds a set of structurally stable and spatially representative anchors from both original and edited Gaussians. These anchors serve as robust region-level references, and their correspondences are established via optimal transport to enable consistent deformation propagation without cross-region interference or motion drift. Complementarily, Color Uncertainty-guided Appearance Refinement (CUAR) preserves temporal appearance consistency by estimating per-Gaussian color uncertainty and selectively refining regions prone to occlusion-induced artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Catalyst4D achieves temporally stable, high-fidelity dynamic scene editing and outperforms existing methods in both visual quality and motion coherence.

AI.tldr: Catalyst4D是一个将高质量3D编辑迁移到动态4D高斯场景的框架，同时保持空间和时间一致性，解决了现有方法在动态场景编辑中产生的运动伪影、时间闪烁和风格传播不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 当前3D场景编辑使用NeRF和3DGS技术已能实现高质量的静态场景编辑，但动态场景编辑仍具挑战性。直接将2D扩散模型扩展到4D的方法往往产生运动伪影、时间闪烁和风格传播不一致等问题。
AI.method: 核心方法包括两部分：1) 基于锚点的运动引导(AMG)：从原始和编辑后的高斯中构建一组结构稳定、空间代表性的锚点，通过最优传输建立对应关系，实现一致的变形传播，避免跨区域干扰和运动漂移；2) 颜色不确定性引导的外观细化(CUAR)：通过估计每个高斯的颜色不确定性，选择性细化容易出现遮挡伪影的区域，保持时间外观一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明Catalyst4D实现了时间稳定、高保真的动态场景编辑，在视觉质量和运动一致性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Catalyst4D成功地将高质量3D编辑迁移到动态4D高斯场景，通过锚点对应和颜色不确定性估计技术有效解决了动态编辑中的时间一致性问题，达到了领先的编辑效果。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D-to-4D scene editing using 3D Gaussian Splatting, which is a different application domain from the research profile. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion priors from 2D video content, using video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance) and VLMs for quality control. This paper focuses on editing existing 3D scenes to create dynamic 4D content, not on generating 3D motion from 2D videos. The methods also differ significantly: the paper uses anchor-based motion guidance and color uncertainty estimation with 3DGS, while the profile requires video generation models and VLM-based quality supervision. This is a scene editing task, not a motion generation from video task.

title: PVI: Plug-in Visual Injection for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: VLA architectures that pair a pretrained VLM with a flow-matching action expert have emerged as a strong paradigm for language-conditioned manipulation. Yet the VLM, optimized for semantic abstraction and typically conditioned on static visual observations, tends to attenuate fine-grained geometric cues and often lacks explicit temporal evidence for the action expert. Prior work mitigates this by injecting auxiliary visual features, but existing approaches either focus on static spatial representations or require substantial architectural modifications to accommodate temporal inputs, leaving temporal information underexplored. We propose Plug-in Visual Injection (PVI), a lightweight, encoder-agnostic module that attaches to a pretrained action expert and injects auxiliary visual representations via zero-initialized residual pathways, preserving pretrained behavior with only single-stage fine-tuning. Using PVI, we obtain consistent gains over the base policy and a range of competitive alternative injection strategies, and our controlled study shows that temporal video features (V-JEPA2) outperform strong static image features (DINOv2), with the largest gains on multi-phase tasks requiring state tracking and coordination. Real-robot experiments on long-horizon bimanual cloth folding further demonstrate the practicality of PVI beyond simulation.

AI.tldr: 提出PVI模块，通过零初始化残差路径将时序视觉特征注入动作专家，解决VLA架构中细粒度几何线索衰减和时序信息缺失问题，实现轻量级单阶段微调。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA架构中，预训练VLM通常针对语义抽象优化且基于静态视觉观察，容易削弱细粒度几何线索，缺乏动作专家所需的时序证据。现有方法或聚焦静态空间表征，或需大幅修改架构，时序信息利用不足。
AI.method: 提出Plug-in Visual Injection (PVI)，一种轻量级、编码器无关的模块，通过零初始化残差路径将辅助视觉表征注入预训练动作专家，仅需单阶段微调即可保留预训练行为。
AI.result: 相比基线策略和多种竞争性注入策略，PVI持续获得性能提升。控制实验表明时序视频特征(V-JEPA2)优于强静态图像特征(DINOv2)，在需要状态跟踪和协调的多阶段任务中提升最大。真实机器人长程双臂布料折叠实验验证了实用性。
AI.conclusion: PVI通过零初始化残差路径注入视觉特征，在保持预训练行为的同时实现单阶段微调。实验表明时序视频特征(V-JEPA2)显著优于静态图像特征(DINOv2)，在多阶段任务中提升最大。真实机器人长程双臂布料折叠任务验证了PVI的实用性。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for ROBOT CONTROL (cloth folding, manipulation tasks), which is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on 3D MOTION GENERATION from 2D video content. While both use VLMs and visual features, the application domain is robotics/manipulation, not computer graphics motion synthesis. The paper deals with injecting visual features into action experts for robot control, not extracting 3D motion priors from video or generating 3D motion representations. Robot motion control is a different application domain from human/object motion generation in computer graphics.

title: Generalized Recognition of Basic Surgical Actions Enables Skill Assessment and Vision-Language-Model-based Surgical Planning
summary: Artificial intelligence, imaging, and large language models have the potential to transform surgical practice, training, and automation. Understanding and modeling of basic surgical actions (BSA), the fundamental unit of operation in any surgery, is important to drive the evolution of this field. In this paper, we present a BSA dataset comprising 10 basic actions across 6 surgical specialties with over 11,000 video clips, which is the largest to date. Based on the BSA dataset, we developed a new foundation model that conducts general-purpose recognition of basic actions. Our approach demonstrates robust cross-specialist performance in experiments validated on datasets from different procedural types and various body parts. Furthermore, we demonstrate downstream applications enabled by the BAS foundation model through surgical skill assessment in prostatectomy using domain-specific knowledge, and action planning in cholecystectomy and nephrectomy using large vision-language models. Multinational surgeons' evaluation of the language model's output of the action planning explainable texts demonstrated clinical relevance. These findings indicate that basic surgical actions can be robustly recognized across scenarios, and an accurate BSA understanding model can essentially facilitate complex applications and speed up the realization of surgical superintelligence.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了包含11,000+视频片段的最大的基础外科动作数据集，开发了跨专科通用识别基础模型，验证了在技能评估和行动规划等下游应用中的有效性，为外科超级智能奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 人工智能、成像技术和大型语言模型有潜力改变外科实践、培训和自动化。理解和建模基础外科动作(BSA)是推动该领域发展的关键，但此前缺乏大规模的BSA数据集和通用基础模型。
AI.method: 构建了包含10种基础外科动作、覆盖6个外科专科、超过11,000个视频片段的BSA数据集；基于该数据集开发了通用的基础动作识别基础模型；在不同手术类型和身体部位的数据集上验证跨专科性能；通过前列腺癌根治术的技能评估、胆囊切除术和肾切除术的行动规划展示了下游应用；由多国外科医生评估语言模型输出的可解释文本。
AI.result: 该方法是迄今为止最大的BSA数据集；基础模型展现出强大的跨专科性能；在前列腺癌根治术的技能评估和胆囊切除术、肾切除术的行动规划中展现出良好的应用效果；多国外科医生评估认为语言模型输出具有临床相关性。
AI.conclusion: 基础外科动作可以在不同场景下被稳健识别，准确理解基础外科动作的模型可以有效促进复杂应用的发展，加速外科超级智能的实现。

relevance_reason: The paper is about surgical action recognition in medical videos, which is a completely different application domain from 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While both deal with video understanding, the research profile specifically focuses on extracting 3D motion priors from 2D video and generating 3D motion output - whereas this paper focuses on classifying/recognizing surgical actions for skill assessment and surgical planning. The paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points: no 3D motion extraction, no motion generation models (like diffusion-based methods), no connection to video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance). This belongs to medical AI/healthcare AI rather than computer graphics/computer vision for motion generation.

title: Think and Answer ME: Benchmarking and Exploring Multi-Entity Reasoning Grounding in Remote Sensing
summary: Recent advances in reasoning language models and reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards have significantly enhanced multi-step reasoning capabilities. This progress motivates the extension of reasoning paradigms to remote sensing visual grounding task. However, existing remote sensing grounding methods remain largely confined to perception-level matching and single-entity formulations, limiting the role of explicit reasoning and inter-entity modeling. To address this challenge, we introduce a new benchmark dataset for Multi-Entity Reasoning Grounding in Remote Sensing (ME-RSRG). Based on ME-RSRG, we reformulate remote sensing grounding as a multi-entity reasoning task and propose an Entity-Aware Reasoning (EAR) framework built upon visual-linguistic foundation models. EAR generates structured reasoning traces and subject-object grounding outputs. It adopts supervised fine-tuning for cold-start initialization and is further optimized via entity-aware reward-driven Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Extensive experiments on ME-RSRG demonstrate the challenges of multi-entity reasoning and verify the effectiveness of our proposed EAR framework. Our dataset, code, and models will be available at https://github.com/CV-ShuchangLyu/ME-RSRG.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ME-RSRG多实体推理遥感接地基准数据集和EAR框架，将遥感接地任务重新定义为多实体推理任务，采用监督微调和实体感知奖励驱动的GRPO优化方法，实验验证了框架的有效性。
AI.motivation: 推理语言模型和可验证奖励的强化学习最新进展显著提升了多步推理能力，这促使将推理范式扩展到遥感视觉接地任务。现有遥感接地方法仍局限于感知级匹配和单实体公式，限制了显式推理和实体间建模的能力。
AI.method: 提出Entity-Aware Reasoning(EAR)框架，基于视觉语言基础模型构建，采用监督微调进行冷启动初始化，并通过实体感知的奖励驱动Group Relative Policy Optimization(GRPO)进行进一步优化，生成结构化推理轨迹和主体-客体接地输出。
AI.result: 在ME-RSRG数据集上的广泛实验证明了多实体推理任务的挑战性，并验证了所提出的EAR框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功构建了ME-RSRG多实体推理基准数据集，并提出了EAR框架来应对遥感视觉接地任务中的多实体推理挑战。通过监督微调和基于实体感知的奖励驱动GRPO优化，EAR框架能够生成结构化推理轨迹和主客体检索结果。实验验证了多实体推理任务的挑战性和EAR框架的有效性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing (satellite/aerial imagery) and multi-entity reasoning grounding - completely different application domain from the research profile which focuses on 3D motion generation from 2D video content. While both involve Vision-Language Models, the paper uses VLM for reasoning about objects in satellite images, not for quality supervision in motion generation or extracting motion priors from video. The application domains are entirely different: remote sensing image understanding vs. video-to-3D motion generation.

title: Spectral Defense Against Resource-Targeting Attack in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) deliver high-quality rendering, yet the Gaussian representation exposes a new attack surface, the resource-targeting attack. This attack poisons training images, excessively inducing Gaussian growth to cause resource exhaustion. Although efficiency-oriented methods such as smoothing, thresholding, and pruning have been explored, these spatial-domain strategies operate on visible structures but overlook how stealthy perturbations distort the underlying spectral behaviors of training data. As a result, poisoned inputs introduce abnormal high-frequency amplifications that mislead 3DGS into interpreting noisy patterns as detailed structures, ultimately causing unstable Gaussian overgrowth and degraded scene fidelity. To address this, we propose \textbf{Spectral Defense} in Gaussian and image fields. We first design a 3D frequency filter to selectively prune Gaussians exhibiting abnormally high frequencies. Since natural scenes also contain legitimate high-frequency structures, directly suppressing high frequencies is insufficient, and we further develop a 2D spectral regularization on renderings, distinguishing naturally isotropic frequencies while penalizing anisotropic angular energy to constrain noisy patterns. Experiments show that our defense builds robust, accurate, and secure 3DGS, suppressing overgrowth by up to $5.92\times$, reducing memory by up to $3.66\times$, and improving speed by up to $4.34\times$ under attacks.

AI.tldr: 针对3D Gaussian Splatting资源目标攻击问题，提出Spectral Defense方法，通过3D频率滤波器剪枝异常高频Gaussians，并利用2D光谱正则化区分自然频率与噪声模式，有效抑制过度生长、降低内存消耗、提升渲染速度。
AI.motivation: 当前3D Gaussian Splatting面临资源目标攻击（resource-targeting attack）的威胁，攻击者通过污染训练图像诱导Gaussian过度增长导致资源耗尽。现有的空间域防御策略（如平滑、阈值化、剪枝）仅关注可见结构，忽视 stealthy perturbations 对训练数据底层光谱行为的扭曲，导致噪声模式被误解释为细节结构，引起不稳定的Gaussian过度生长。
AI.method: 提出Spectral Defense方法，包含两个核心组件：1) 3D频率滤波器：选择性剪枝表现出异常高频的Gaussians；2) 2D光谱正则化：区分自然各向同性频率同时惩罚各向异性角能量，以约束噪声模式。
AI.result: 实验表明，该防御方法在遭受攻击时：抑制过度生长达5.92×，内存减少达3.66×，速度提升达4.34×。
AI.conclusion: Spectral Defense通过3D频率滤波器和2D光谱正则化技术，有效构建了鲁棒、准确、安全的3DGS。该方法在资源消耗、场景保真度和安全性之间取得了良好的平衡，为3DGS抵御投毒攻击提供了新的防御范式。

relevance_reason: The paper is about defending 3D Gaussian Splatting rendering systems against resource-targeting attacks using spectral filtering. While it is in Computer Graphics, the application domain is completely different from the research profile. The profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video using video generation models and VLMs, while this paper focuses on security/robustness in 3D scene rendering. The methods, goals, and pain points have no overlap - this is about adversarial defense in rendering, not motion generation or video-to-3D conversion.

title: OARS: Process-Aware Online Alignment for Generative Real-World Image Super-Resolution
summary: Aligning generative real-world image super-resolution models with human visual preference is challenging due to the perception--fidelity trade-off and diverse, unknown degradations. Prior approaches rely on offline preference optimization and static metric aggregation, which are often non-interpretable and prone to pseudo-diversity under strong conditioning. We propose OARS, a process-aware online alignment framework built on COMPASS, a MLLM-based reward that evaluates the LR to SR transition by jointly modeling fidelity preservation and perceptual gain with an input-quality-adaptive trade-off. To train COMPASS, we curate COMPASS-20K spanning synthetic and real degradations, and introduce a three-stage perceptual annotation pipeline that yields calibrated, fine-grained training labels. Guided by COMPASS, OARS performs progressive online alignment from cold-start flow matching to full-reference and finally reference-free RL via shallow LoRA optimization for on-policy exploration. Extensive experiments and user studies demonstrate consistent perceptual improvements while maintaining fidelity, achieving state-of-the-art performance on Real-ISR benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出OARS框架，一种基于COMPASS MLLM奖励模型的在线感知对齐方法，用于真实世界图像超分辨率，解决感知-保真度权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 生成式真实世界图像超分辨率模型与人类视觉偏好对齐具有挑战性，原因包括：1) 感知-保真度权衡；2) 多样且未知的退化；3) 现有离线偏好优化和静态度量聚合方法不可解释性强，且在强条件下容易出现伪多样性。
AI.method: 提出OARS过程感知在线对齐框架，基于COMPASS：1) MLLM奖励模型，联合建模保真度保持和感知增益，具有输入质量自适应权衡；2) 构建COMPASS-20K数据集，包含合成和真实退化；3) 引入三阶段感知标注流程，生成校准的细粒度训练标签；4) 使用渐进式在线对齐，从冷启动流匹配到全参考最终无参考RL，通过浅层LoRA优化进行策略探索。
AI.result: 广泛实验和用户研究表明，OARS在保持保真度的同时实现一致的感知提升，在Real-ISR基准上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: OARS框架通过COMPASS MLLM奖励模型和渐进式在线对齐策略，成功解决了超分辨率中的感知-保真度权衡问题，为真实世界图像超分辨率提供了有效的感知对齐方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Image Super-Resolution (ISR), which deals with enhancing 2D single images. The research profile is specifically about 3D MOTION GENERATION from 2D video content, video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), and extracting 3D motion priors. These are completely different application domains - the paper addresses 2D image enhancement, not video-to-3D motion generation. While the paper does use Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for quality supervision, this is applied to image quality, not motion quality or cross-modal alignment for motion representations. The core task and output are fundamentally different (2D image enhancement vs. 3D motion generation from video).

title: coDrawAgents: A Multi-Agent Dialogue Framework for Compositional Image Generation
summary: Text-to-image generation has advanced rapidly, but existing models still struggle with faithfully composing multiple objects and preserving their attributes in complex scenes. We propose coDrawAgents, an interactive multi-agent dialogue framework with four specialized agents: Interpreter, Planner, Checker, and Painter that collaborate to improve compositional generation. The Interpreter adaptively decides between a direct text-to-image pathway and a layout-aware multi-agent process. In the layout-aware mode, it parses the prompt into attribute-rich object descriptors, ranks them by semantic salience, and groups objects with the same semantic priority level for joint generation. Guided by the Interpreter, the Planner adopts a divide-and-conquer strategy, incrementally proposing layouts for objects with the same semantic priority level while grounding decisions in the evolving visual context of the canvas. The Checker introduces an explicit error-correction mechanism by validating spatial consistency and attribute alignment, and refining layouts before they are rendered. Finally, the Painter synthesizes the image step by step, incorporating newly planned objects into the canvas to provide richer context for subsequent iterations. Together, these agents address three key challenges: reducing layout complexity, grounding planning in visual context, and enabling explicit error correction. Extensive experiments on benchmarks GenEval and DPG-Bench demonstrate that coDrawAgents substantially improves text-image alignment, spatial accuracy, and attribute binding compared to existing methods.

AI.tldr: coDrawAgents是一个多智能体协作的文本到图像生成框架，通过Interpreter、Planner、Checker和Painter四个专业智能体的分工合作，有效解决了复杂场景中多对象组合和属性保留的难题，在基准测试中展现了优异的性能。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像生成技术快速发展，但现有模型在复杂场景中仍难以准确组合多个对象并保持其属性一致性。这是当前文本到图像生成领域面临的主要挑战。
AI.method: 提出了coDrawAgents，一个交互式多智能体对话框架，包含四个专业智能体：Interpreter（解释器）、Planner（规划器）、Checker（检查器）和Painter（绘制器）。Interpreter自适应决定直接文本到图像路径或布局感知多智能体过程；Planner采用分而治之策略，逐步为同一语义优先级对象提出布局；Checker通过验证空间一致性和属性对齐来纠正错误；Painter逐步合成图像。
AI.result: 在GenEval和DPG-Bench基准测试上的广泛实验表明，coDrawAgents在文本图像对齐、空间准确性和属性绑定方面相较于现有方法有显著改进。
AI.conclusion: coDrawAgents通过四个专业智能体的协作，有效解决了文本到图像生成中的三个关键挑战：降低布局复杂度、将规划基于视觉上下文以及实现显式错误修正。该框架在复杂场景中对象组合和属性保留方面表现出显著改进。

relevance_reason: This paper is about text-to-image generation (2D static images), while the research profile is about extracting 3D MOTION from 2D video content. These are completely different application domains: image generation vs motion generation. The output is fundamentally different - static 2D images vs temporal 3D motion sequences. Although both are in Computer Vision/Graphics, the application domain mismatch is critical - generating 2D images from text is not related to generating 3D motion from video.

title: Multimodal Protein Language Models for Enzyme Kinetic Parameters: From Substrate Recognition to Conformational Adaptation
summary: Predicting enzyme kinetic parameters quantifies how efficiently an enzyme catalyzes a specific substrate under defined biochemical conditions. Canonical parameters such as the turnover number ($k_\text{cat}$), Michaelis constant ($K_\text{m}$), and inhibition constant ($K_\text{i}$) depend jointly on the enzyme sequence, the substrate chemistry, and the conformational adaptation of the active site during binding. Many learning pipelines simplify this process to a static compatibility problem between the enzyme and substrate, fusing their representations through shallow operations and regressing a single value. Such formulations overlook the staged nature of catalysis, which involves both substrate recognition and conformational adaptation. In this regard, we reformulate kinetic prediction as a staged multimodal conditional modeling problem and introduce the Enzyme-Reaction Bridging Adapter (ERBA), which injects cross-modal information via fine-tuning into Protein Language Models (PLMs) while preserving their biochemical priors. ERBA performs conditioning in two stages: Molecular Recognition Cross-Attention (MRCA) first injects substrate information into the enzyme representation to capture specificity; Geometry-aware Mixture-of-Experts (G-MoE) then integrates active-site structure and routes samples to pocket-specialized experts to reflect induced fit. To maintain semantic fidelity, Enzyme-Substrate Distribution Alignment (ESDA) enforces distributional consistency within the PLM manifold in a reproducing kernel Hilbert space. Experiments across three kinetic endpoints and multiple PLM backbones, ERBA delivers consistent gains and stronger out-of-distribution performance compared with sequence-only and shallow-fusion baselines, offering a biologically grounded route to scalable kinetic prediction and a foundation for adding cofactors, mutations, and time-resolved structural cues.

AI.tldr: ERBA是一种新型酶动力学参数预测框架，通过两阶段条件建模(底物识别+构象适应)整合酶序列、底物化学和活性位点结构信息，在多个动力学指标上超越传统浅层融合方法。
AI.motivation: 传统学习方法将酶动力学预测简化为酶与底物之间的静态兼容性预测，使用浅层操作融合表示并回归单一数值。这种方法忽略了催化的阶段性特征——包括底物识别和构象适应。现有方法未能充分捕捉酶序列、底物化学和活性位点构象适应之间的复杂交互。
AI.method: 提出酶-反应桥接适配器(ERBA)，通过微调将跨模态信息注入蛋白质语言模型(PLM)，同时保留其生物化学先验。ERBA采用两阶段条件建模：1) 分子识别交叉注意力(MRCA)将底物信息注入酶表示以捕捉特异性；2) 几何感知专家混合(G-MoE)整合活性位点结构并将样本路由到口袋专业化专家。酶-底物分布对齐(ESDA)在再生核希尔伯特空间中强制执行PLM流形内的分布一致性。
AI.result: 在三个动力学指标和多个PLM backbone上进行了实验，ERBA相比仅序列和浅层融合基线方法获得一致的性能提升，展现更强的分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ERBA提供了一种生物学上合理的可扩展动力学预测方法，为添加辅因子、突变和时间分辨结构线索奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational biology/bioinformatics - specifically enzyme kinetic parameter prediction using protein language models. It has NO relevance to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics/Computer Vision for 3D motion generation from 2D video. The application domains are completely different - protein analysis vs visual/motion computing. Despite both using "language models" and "cross-attention", the core research areas are entirely unrelated.

title: Wear Classification of Abrasive Flap Wheels using a Hierarchical Deep Learning Approach
summary: Abrasive flap wheels are common for finishing complex free-form surfaces due to their flexibility. However, this flexibility results in complex wear patterns such as concave/convex flap profiles or flap tears, which influence the grinding result. This paper proposes a novel, vision-based hierarchical classification framework to automate the wear condition monitoring of flap wheels. Unlike monolithic classification approaches, we decompose the problem into three logical levels: (1) state detection (new vs. worn), (2) wear type identification (rectangular, concave, convex) and flap tear detection, and (3) severity assessment (partial vs. complete deformation). A custom-built dataset of real flap wheel images was generated and a transfer learning approach with EfficientNetV2 architecture was used. The results demonstrate high robustness with classification accuracies ranging from 93.8% (flap tears) to 99.3% (concave severity). Furthermore, Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad-CAM) is utilized to validate that the models learn physically relevant features and examine false classifications. The proposed hierarchical method provides a basis for adaptive process control and wear consideration in automated flap wheel grinding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的分层分类框架，用于自动化磨轮磨损状态监测。与整体分类方法不同，该方法将问题分解为三个层次：状态检测、磨损类型识别和严重程度评估。使用EfficientNetV2迁移学习，在自定义数据集上达到93.8%-99.3%的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 磨料磨轮因其灵活性常用于复杂自由曲面的精加工，但这种灵活性导致复杂的磨损模式（如凹/凸flap轮廓或flap撕裂），影响磨削结果。需要实现磨轮磨损状态的自动化监测。

title: Composing Driving Worlds through Disentangled Control for Adversarial Scenario Generation
summary: A major challenge in autonomous driving is the "long tail" of safety-critical edge cases, which often emerge from unusual combinations of common traffic elements. Synthesizing these scenarios is crucial, yet current controllable generative models provide incomplete or entangled guidance, preventing the independent manipulation of scene structure, object identity, and ego actions. We introduce CompoSIA, a compositional driving video simulator that disentangles these traffic factors, enabling fine-grained control over diverse adversarial driving scenarios. To support controllable identity replacement of scene elements, we propose a noise-level identity injection, allowing pose-agnostic identity generation across diverse element poses, all from a single reference image. Furthermore, a hierarchical dual-branch action control mechanism is introduced to improve action controllability. Such disentangled control enables adversarial scenario synthesis-systematically combining safe elements into dangerous configurations that entangled generators cannot produce. Extensive comparisons demonstrate superior controllable generation quality over state-of-the-art baselines, with a 17% improvement in FVD for identity editing and reductions of 30% and 47% in rotation and translation errors for action control. Furthermore, downstream stress-testing reveals substantial planner failures: across editing modalities, the average collision rate of 3s increases by 173%.

AI.tldr: CompoSIA是一个组合驾驶视频模拟器，通过解耦场景结构、物体身份和自我动作这三个交通因素，实现对对抗性驾驶场景的细粒度控制。该方法提出噪声级身份注入和分层双分支动作控制机制，在多项指标上优于现有最先进基线方法

AI.conclusion: CompoSIA在多个指标上显著优于现有方法，能够生成更具威胁性的对抗性场景，导致下游规划器的碰撞率大幅增加（3秒内增加173%），证明了可控生成对自动驾驶安全测试的重要价值

title: TRACE: Structure-Aware Character Encoding for Robust and Generalizable Document Watermarking
summary: We propose TRACE, a structure-aware framework leveraging diffusion models for localized character encoding to embed data. Unlike existing methods that rely on edge features or pre-defined codebooks, TRACE exploits character structures that provide inherent resistance to noise interference due to their stability and unified representation across diverse characters. Our framework comprises three key components: (1) adaptive diffusion initialization that automatically identifies handle points, target points, and editing regions through specialized algorithms including movement probability estimator (MPE), target point estimation (TPE) and mask drawing model (MDM), (2) guided diffusion encoding for precise movement of selected point, and (3) masked region replacement with a specialized loss function to minimize feature alterations after the diffusion process. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate \name{}'s superior performance over state-of-the-art methods, achieving more than 5 dB improvement in PSNR and 5\% higher extraction accuracy following cross-media transmission. \name{} achieves broad generalizability across multiple languages and fonts, making it particularly suitable for practical document security applications.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一种基于扩散模型的字符编码框架，利用字符结构稳定性实现抗噪声的数据嵌入，适用于文档安全领域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖边缘特征或预定义码书，易受噪声干扰。本文利用字符结构固有的稳定性和跨字符统一表示特性，提供更强的抗噪声干扰能力。
AI.method: 框架包含三个关键组件：1) 自适应扩散初始化 - 通过移动概率估计器(MPE)、目标点估计(TPE)和掩码绘制模型(MDM)自动识别控制点、目标点和编辑区域；2) 引导扩散编码 - 精确移动选定点；3) 掩码区域替换 - 使用专门损失函数最小化扩散后的特征改变。

AI.conclusion: TRACE在文档安全应用中具有优越性能，尤其适合需要高抗噪声能力的实际场景。

title: Forecasting Epileptic Seizures from Contactless Camera via Cross-Species Transfer Learning
summary: Epileptic seizure forecasting is a clinically important yet challenging problem in epilepsy research. Existing approaches predominantly rely on neural signals such as electroencephalography (EEG), which require specialized equipment and limit long-term deployment in real-world settings. In contrast, video data provide a non-invasive and accessible alternative, yet existing video-based studies mainly focus on post-onset seizure detection, leaving seizure forecasting largely unexplored. In this work, we formulate a novel task of video-based epileptic seizure forecasting, where short pre-ictal video segments (3-10 seconds) are used to predict whether a seizure will occur within the subsequent 5 seconds. To address the scarcity of annotated human epilepsy videos, we propose a cross-species transfer learning framework that leverages large-scale rodent video data for auxiliary pretraining. This enables the model to capture seizure-related behavioral dynamics that generalize across species. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves over 70% prediction accuracy under a strictly video-only setting and outperforms existing baselines. These findings highlight the potential of cross-species learning for building non-invasive, scalable early-warning systems for epilepsy.

AI.conclusion: 研究证明了跨物种学习在构建非侵入性、可扩展的癫痫早期预警系统方面的潜力，为癫痫看护提供了新的解决方案。

title: Spectral-Geometric Neural Fields for Pose-Free LiDAR View Synthesis
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) have shown remarkable success in image novel view synthesis (NVS), inspiring extensions to LiDAR NVS. However, most methods heavily rely on accurate camera poses for scene reconstruction. The sparsity and textureless nature of LiDAR data also present distinct challenges, leading to geometric holes and discontinuous surfaces. To address these issues, we propose SG-NLF, a pose-free LiDAR NeRF framework that integrates spectral information with geometric consistency. Specifically, we design a hybrid representation based on spectral priors to reconstruct smooth geometry. For pose optimization, we construct a confidence-aware graph based on feature compatibility to achieve global alignment. In addition, an adversarial learning strategy is introduced to enforce cross-frame consistency, thereby enhancing reconstruction quality. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework, especially in challenging low-frequency scenarios. Compared to previous state-of-the-art methods, SG-NLF improves reconstruction quality and pose accuracy by over 35.8% and 68.8%. Our work can provide a novel perspective for LiDAR view synthesis.

AI.tldr: SG-NLF是一种无姿态LiDAR NeRF框架，通过光谱先验混合表示、置信度图全局对齐和对抗学习解决LiDAR数据稀疏性和姿态依赖问题，实现高质量场景重建。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR NeRF方法高度依赖精确相机姿态，且LiDAR数据的稀疏性和无纹理特性导致几何空洞和表面不连续问题，亟需一种无需精确姿态即可实现高质量重建的框架。

AI.conclusion: SG-NLF在LiDAR视图合成方面提供了新视角，通过结合光谱先验、图结构全局对齐和对抗学习，有效解决了无姿态LiDAR NeRF的挑战。该方法在重建质量和姿态精度上分别提升超过35.8%和68.8%，证明了光谱信息与几何一致性结合的有效性。

title: VIRD: View-Invariant Representation through Dual-Axis Transformation for Cross-View Pose Estimation
summary: Accurate global localization is crucial for autonomous driving and robotics, but GNSS-based approaches often degrade due to occlusion and multipath effects. As an emerging alternative, cross-view pose estimation predicts the 3-DoF camera pose corresponding to a ground-view image with respect to a geo-referenced satellite image. However, existing methods struggle to bridge the significant viewpoint gap between the ground and satellite views mainly due to limited spatial correspondences. We propose a novel cross-view pose estimation method that constructs view-invariant representations through dual-axis transformation (VIRD). VIRD first applies a polar transformation to the satellite view to establish horizontal correspondence, then uses context-enhanced positional attention on the ground and polar-transformed satellite features to resolve vertical misalignment, explicitly mitigating the viewpoint gap. A view-reconstruction loss is introduced to strengthen the view invariance further, encouraging the derived representations to reconstruct the original and cross-view images. Experiments on the KITTI and VIGOR datasets demonstrate that VIRD outperforms the state-of-the-art methods without orientation priors, reducing median position and orientation errors by 50.7% and 76.5% on KITTI, and 18.0% and 46.8% on VIGOR, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VIRD方法，通过极坐标变换和上下文增强的位置注意力弥合地面与卫星视图的视角差距，实现跨视图相机姿态估计，在KITTI和VIGOR数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: GNSS-based定位常因遮挡和多径效应而退化，现有的跨视图姿态估计方法由于地面与卫星视图之间视角差异大且空间对应有限，难以准确预测相机6-DoF姿态。
AI.method: VIRD采用双轴变换构建视角不变表示：首先对卫星视图进行极坐标变换以建立水平对应；然后对地面视图和极坐标变换后的卫星特征使用上下文增强的位置注意力来解决垂直错位问题；引入视角重建损失来增强视角不变性，鼓励派生表示重建原始视图和跨视图图像。
AI.result: 在KITTI和VIGOR数据集上的实验表明，VIRD在无需方向先验的情况下优于最先进的方法：KITTI上中位位置误差减少50.7%，方向误差减少76.5%；VIGOR上分别减少18.0%和46.8%。
AI.conclusion: VIRD通过双轴变换和视角重建损失有效弥合了地面与卫星视图之间的视角差距，在没有方向先验的情况下，在KITTI数据集上实现了50.7%的位置误差减少和76.5%的方向误差减少，在VIGOR数据集上分别减少18.0%和46.8%，验证了其在自动驾驶和机器人定位中的有效性和优越性。

title: Rethinking VLMs for Image Forgery Detection and Localization
summary: With the rapid rise of Artificial Intelligence Generated Content (AIGC), image manipulation has become increasingly accessible, posing significant challenges for image forgery detection and localization (IFDL). In this paper, we study how to fully leverage vision-language models (VLMs) to assist the IFDL task. In particular, we observe that priors from VLMs hardly benefit the detection and localization performance and even have negative effects due to their inherent biases toward semantic plausibility rather than authenticity. Additionally, the location masks explicitly encode the forgery concepts, which can serve as extra priors for VLMs to ease their training optimization, thus enhancing the interpretability of detection and localization results. Building on these findings, we propose a new IFDL pipeline named IFDL-VLM. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct experiments on 9 popular benchmarks and assess the model performance under both in-domain and cross-dataset generalization settings. The experimental results show that we consistently achieve new state-of-the-art performance in detection, localization, and interpretability.Code is available at: https://github.com/sha0fengGuo/IFDL-VLM.

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何充分利用视觉语言模型(VLMs)辅助图像伪造检测和定位(IFDL)任务，发现VLMs先验因偏向语义合理性而非真实性而难以直接应用，提出利用位置掩码作为额外先验的IFDL-VLM方法，在9个基准数据集上实现最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能生成内容(AIGC)的快速发展，图像操纵变得日益便捷，对图像伪造检测和定位(IFDL)提出了重大挑战。研究发现视觉语言模型(VLMs)的先验由于固有地偏向语义合理性而非真实性，几乎无法惠及检测和定位性能，甚至产生负面影响。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的IFDL-VLM流水线，利用位置掩码编码的伪造概念作为视觉语言模型的额外先验，帮助VLMs进行训练优化，从而增强检测和定位结果的可解释性。
AI.result: 在9个流行基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，评估了模型在域内和跨数据集泛化设置下的性能。实验结果表明，该方法在检测、定位和可解释性方面均一致取得了新的最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的IFDL-VLM方法通过利用位置掩码作为视觉语言模型的额外先验，有效解决了传统方法中VLMs先验对IFDL任务贡献有限甚至产生负面影响的问题，在9个基准数据集上实现了检测、定位和可解释性的新最优性能。

title: SGMatch: Semantic-Guided Non-Rigid Shape Matching with Flow Regularization
summary: Establishing accurate point-to-point correspondences between non-rigid 3D shapes remains a critical challenge, particularly under non-isometric deformations and topological noise. Existing functional map pipelines suffer from ambiguities that geometric descriptors alone cannot resolve, and spatial inconsistencies inherent in the projection of truncated spectral bases to dense pointwise correspondences. In this paper, we introduce SGMatch, a learning-based framework for semantic-guided non-rigid shape matching. Specifically, we design a Semantic-Guided Local Cross-Attention module that integrates semantic features from vision foundation models into geometric descriptors while preserving local structural continuity. Furthermore, we introduce a regularization objective based on conditional flow matching, which supervises a time-varying velocity field to encourage spatial smoothness of the recovered correspondences. Experimental results on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that SGMatch achieves competitive performance across near-isometric settings and consistent improvements under non-isometric deformations and topological noise.

AI.tldr: SGMatch是一个基于学习的非刚性形状匹配框架，通过语义引导的局部交叉注意力模块将视觉基础模型的语义特征整合到几何描述符中，并引入基于条件流匹配的监督目标来增强空间平滑性，在非等距变形和拓扑噪声情况下实现一致的改进。
AI.motivation: 建立非刚性3D形状之间的精确点对点对应关系仍然是一个关键挑战，特别是在非等距变形和拓扑噪声情况下。现有的功能映射管道存在模糊性，空间投影也存在不一致问题。
AI.method: 设计了语义引导的局部交叉注意力模块(Semantic-Guided Local Cross-Attention)，将视觉基础模型的语义特征与几何描述符集成，同时保留局部结构连续性；引入基于条件流匹配的正则化目标，监督时变速度场以鼓励恢复对应关系的空间平滑性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上进行了实验，SGMatch在近等距设置下实现了竞争性能，并在非等距变形和拓扑噪声下获得一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: SGMatch成功地将语义信息与几何特征相结合，通过流匹配正则化提升了匹配质量，在处理复杂变形和噪声情况时表现出更强的鲁棒性。

title: Test-Time Attention Purification for Backdoored Large Vision Language Models
summary: Despite the strong multimodal performance, large vision-language models (LVLMs) are vulnerable during fine-tuning to backdoor attacks, where adversaries insert trigger-embedded samples into the training data to implant behaviors that can be maliciously activated at test time. Existing defenses typically rely on retraining backdoored parameters (e.g., adapters or LoRA modules) with clean data, which is computationally expensive and often degrades model performance. In this work, we provide a new mechanistic understanding of backdoor behaviors in LVLMs: the trigger does not influence prediction through low-level visual patterns, but through abnormal cross-modal attention redistribution, where trigger-bearing visual tokens steal attention away from the textual context - a phenomenon we term attention stealing. Motivated by this, we propose CleanSight, a training-free, plug-and-play defense that operates purely at test time. CleanSight (i) detects poisoned inputs based on the relative visual-text attention ratio in selected cross-modal fusion layers, and (ii) purifies the input by selectively pruning the suspicious high-attention visual tokens to neutralize the backdoor activation. Extensive experiments show that CleanSight significantly outperforms existing pixel-based purification defenses across diverse datasets and backdoor attack types, while preserving the model's utility on both clean and poisoned samples.

AI.tldr: 提出CleanSight，一种针对大型视觉语言模型后门攻击的免训练、仅在测试时工作的防御方法。该方法通过检测跨模态融合层中的异常注意力重分配（"注意力窃取"现象），并选择性剪枝高注意力视觉tokens来净化中毒输入。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法依赖用干净数据重新训练后门参数（如adapters或LoRA模块），计算成本高且会损害模型性能。需要新的机制理解来开发更高效的防御手段。
AI.method:
1. 发现关键机制：触发器通过异常跨模态注意力重分配起作用（注意力窃取），而非低层视觉模式
2. 提出CleanSight：基于选定跨模态融合层中的相对视觉-文本注意力比率检测中毒输入，通过选择性剪枝可疑高注意力视觉 tokens 来净化输入
AI.result: CleanSight在多种数据集和后门攻击类型上显著优于现有的基于像素的净化防御方法，同时保留模型在干净和中毒样本上的实用性

title: A Closed-Form Solution for Debiasing Vision-Language Models with Utility Guarantees Across Modalities and Tasks
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable performance across diverse downstream tasks, recent studies have shown that they can inherit social biases from the training data and further propagate them into downstream applications. To address this issue, various debiasing approaches have been proposed, yet most of them aim to improve fairness without having a theoretical guarantee that the utility of the model is preserved. In this paper, we introduce a debiasing method that yields a \textbf{closed-form} solution in the cross-modal space, achieving Pareto-optimal fairness with \textbf{bounded utility losses}. Our method is \textbf{training-free}, requires \textbf{no annotated data}, and can jointly debias both visual and textual modalities across downstream tasks. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing methods in debiasing VLMs across diverse fairness metrics and datasets for both group and \textbf{intersectional} fairness in downstream tasks such as zero-shot image classification, text-to-image retrieval, and text-to-image generation while preserving task performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、无需标注数据的闭式去偏方法，在跨模态空间中实现帕累托最优公平性且有界utility损失，可同时对视觉和文本模态进行去偏，并在零样本图像分类、文本到图像检索和文本到图像生成等下游任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型(VLM)会从训练数据中继承社会偏见，并将这些偏见传播到下游应用中，而现有去偏方法缺乏保留模型效用的理论保证。
AI.method: 提出一种闭式去偏解决方案，在跨模态空间中实现帕累托最优公平性，具有有界utility损失。该方法无需训练、不需要标注数据，可联合对视觉和文本模态进行去偏。
AI.result: 在多种公平性指标和数据集上，该方法在群体公平性和交叉公平性方面均优于现有方法，同时保留了任务性能，成功应用于零样本图像分类、文本-图像检索和文本-图像生成等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效对VLM进行去偏，且具有理论保证，在多个下游任务和模态上实现了优越的公平性-效用权衡。

title: Multimodal OCR: Parse Anything from Documents
summary: We present Multimodal OCR (MOCR), a document parsing paradigm that jointly parses text and graphics into unified textual representations. Unlike conventional OCR systems that focus on text recognition and leave graphical regions as cropped pixels, our method, termed dots.mocr, treats visual elements such as charts, diagrams, tables, and icons as first-class parsing targets, enabling systems to parse documents while preserving semantic relationships across elements. It offers several advantages: (1) it reconstructs both text and graphics as structured outputs, enabling more faithful document reconstruction; (2) it supports end-to-end training over heterogeneous document elements, allowing models to exploit semantic relations between textual and visual components; and (3) it converts previously discarded graphics into reusable code-level supervision, unlocking multimodal supervision embedded in existing documents. To make this paradigm practical at scale, we build a comprehensive data engine from PDFs, rendered webpages, and native SVG assets, and train a compact 3B-parameter model through staged pretraining and supervised fine-tuning. We evaluate dots.mocr from two perspectives: document parsing and structured graphics parsing. On document parsing benchmarks, it ranks second only to Gemini 3 Pro on our OCR Arena Elo leaderboard, surpasses existing open-source document parsing systems, and sets a new state of the art of 83.9 on olmOCR Bench. On structured graphics parsing, dots.mocr achieves higher reconstruction quality than Gemini 3 Pro across image-to-SVG benchmarks, demonstrating strong performance on charts, UI layouts, scientific figures, and chemical diagrams. These results show a scalable path toward building large-scale image-to-code corpora for multimodal pretraining. Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/rednote-hilab/dots.mocr.

AI.tldr: 提出 Multimodal OCR (MOCR)，将文本和图形统一解析为文本表示，将图表、表格、图标等视觉元素作为一等解析目标，实现文档的结构化重建，支持端到端训练，并将图形转换为可重用的代码级监督。
AI.motivation: 传统OCR系统专注于文本识别并将图形区域留作裁剪的像素，需要一种将图表、图表、表格和图标等视觉元素作为一等解析目标的方法，以在解析文档时保留元素间的语义关系，并将先前丢弃的图形转换为可重用的代码级监督。
AI.method: 构建了来自PDF、渲染网页和原生SVG资产的综合数据引擎，通过分阶段预训练和监督微调训练了紧凑的30亿参数模型。将文本和图形重建为结构化输出，支持对异构文档元素的端到端训练，使模型能够利用文本和视觉组件之间的语义关系。
AI.result: 在文档解析基准测试中，在OCR Arena Elo排行榜上仅次于Gemini 3 Pro，超越现有开源文档解析系统，在olmOCR Bench上创下83.9的新纪录。在结构化图形解析方面，在图像到SVG基准测试中比Gemini 3 Pro实现更高重建质量，在图表、UI布局、科学图形和化学图谱上表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了一条可扩展的构建大规模图像到代码语料库用于多模态预训练的路径。代码和模型已在GitHub上公开可用。

Even though both are in computer vision, this paper has no relevance to motion priors extraction, video-to-3D motion, or any of the specified methods like Wanxiang/Seedance for video generation.

title: ESPIRE: A Diagnostic Benchmark for Embodied Spatial Reasoning of Vision-Language Models
summary: A recent trend in vision-language models (VLMs) has been to enhance their spatial cognition for embodied domains. Despite progress, existing evaluations have been limited both in paradigm and in coverage, hindering rapid, iterative model development. To address these limitations, we propose ESPIRE, a diagnostic benchmark for embodied spatial reasoning. ESPIRE offers a simulated world that physically grounds VLMs and evaluates them on spatial-reasoning-centric robotic tasks, thus narrowing the gap between evaluation and real-world deployment. To adapt VLMs to robotic tasks, we decompose each task into localization and execution, and frame both as generative problems, in stark contrast to predominant discriminative evaluations (e.g., via visual-question answering) that rely on distractors and discard execution. This decomposition further enables a fine-grained analysis beyond passive spatial reasoning toward reasoning to act. We systematically design ESPIRE both at the instruction level and at the environment level, ensuring broad coverage of spatial reasoning scenarios. We use ESPIRE to diagnose a range of frontier VLMs and provide in-depth analysis of their spatial reasoning behaviors.

AI.tldr: ESPIRE是一个用于具身空间推理的诊断基准，通过模拟物理世界将VLMs具象化评估，创新地将机器人任务分解为定位和执行两个生成性问题，突破了传统判别性评估（VQA）的局限，提供细粒度的空间推理分析。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型虽在空间认知方面取得进展，但评估范式和覆盖范围有限，阻碍了模型的快速迭代开发。现有评估主要依赖判别性方法（如视觉问答），需要干扰项且忽略执行环节，与真实世界部署存在差距。
AI.method: 提出ESPIRE基准测试，包含一个模拟世界将VLMs物理具象化。创新性地将任务分解为定位和执行两个阶段，并将其框架为生成性问题（而非传统的判别性VQA评估）。在指令级和环境级进行系统设计，确保空间推理场景的广泛覆盖。
AI.result: 论文对多种前沿VLMs进行了系统诊断，提供了对其空间推理行为的深入分析，展示了ESPIRE基准在评估模型空间推理能力方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ESPIRE enables fine-grained analysis beyond passive spatial reasoning toward reasoning to act, providing broad coverage of spatial reasoning scenarios for diagnosing VLMs' capabilities in embodied domains.

The paper doesn't address extracting 3D motion priors from video, cross-modal alignment for motion representations, or bridging 2D video to 3D motion output - which are the core pain points in the research profile.

title: Reference-Free Image Quality Assessment for Virtual Try-On via Human Feedback
summary: Given a person image and a garment image, image-based Virtual Try-ON (VTON) synthesizes a try-on image of the person wearing the target garment. As VTON systems become increasingly important in practical applications such as fashion e-commerce, reliable evaluation of their outputs has emerged as a critical challenge. In real-world scenarios, ground-truth images of the same person wearing the target garment are typically unavailable, making reference-based evaluation impractical. Moreover, widely used distribution-level metrics such as Fréchet Inception Distance and Kernel Inception Distance measure dataset-level similarity and fail to reflect the perceptual quality of individual generated images. To address these limitations, we propose Image Quality Assessment for Virtual Try-On (VTON-IQA), a reference-free framework for human-aligned, image-level quality assessment without requiring ground-truth images. To model human perceptual judgments, we construct VTON-QBench, a large-scale human-annotated benchmark comprising 62,688 try-on images generated by 14 representative VTON models and 431,800 quality annotations collected from 13,838 qualified annotators. To the best of our knowledge, this is the largest dataset to date for human subjective evaluation in virtual try-on. Evaluating virtual try-on quality requires verifying both garment fidelity and the preservation of person-specific details. To explicitly model such interactions, we introduce an Interleaved Cross-Attention module that extends standard transformer blocks by inserting a cross-attention layer between self-attention and MLP in the latter blocks. Extensive experiments show that VTON-IQA achieves reliable human-aligned image-level quality prediction. Moreover, we conduct a comprehensive benchmark evaluation of 14 representative VTON models using VTON-IQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VTON-IQA，一个无需参考图像的虚拟试穿质量评估框架，用于评估虚拟试穿图像的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有VTON系统在真实场景中缺乏真实参考图像，导致基于参考的评估不可行；而FID/KID等分布级指标无法反映个体生成图像的感知质量。
AI.method: 构建了大规模人类标注基准VTON-QBench（包含14个VTON模型生成的62,688张试穿图像和13,838名标注者的431,800个质量标注）；提出交错交叉注意力模块，在Transformer块的自注意力和MLP之间插入交叉注意力层。
AI.result: VTON-IQA实现了可靠的人类对齐图像级质量预测，并对14个代表性VTON模型进行了综合基准评估。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需真实参考图像即可进行符合人类感知的图像级质量评估，为虚拟试穿系统的实际应用提供了有效的评估工具。

title: Mitigating Memorization in Text-to-Image Diffusion via Region-Aware Prompt Augmentation and Multimodal Copy Detection
summary: State-of-the-art text-to-image diffusion models can produce impressive visuals but may memorize and reproduce training images, creating copyright and privacy risks. Existing prompt perturbations applied at inference time, such as random token insertion or embedding noise, may lower copying but often harm image-prompt alignment and overall fidelity. To address this, we introduce two complementary methods. First, Region-Aware Prompt Augmentation (RAPTA) uses an object detector to find salient regions and turn them into semantically grounded prompt variants, which are randomly sampled during training to increase diversity, while maintaining semantic alignment. Second, Attention-Driven Multimodal Copy Detection (ADMCD) aggregates local patch, global semantic, and texture cues with a lightweight transformer to produce a fused representation, and applies simple thresholded decision rules to detect copying without training with large annotated datasets. Experiments show that RAPTA reduces overfitting while maintaining high synthesis quality, and that ADMCD reliably detects copying, outperforming single-modal metrics.

AI.tldr: 针对文本到图像扩散模型的版权和隐私风险，提出两种互补方法：RAPTA通过区域感知提示增强减少过拟合，ADMCD通过多模态特征融合检测复制，均取得良好效果。
AI.motivation: 最先进的文本到图像扩散模型可能记忆并复现训练图像，造成版权和隐私风险；现有推理时的提示扰动方法虽能降低复制，但往往损害图像-提示对齐和整体质量。
AI.method: RAPTA使用目标检测器定位显著区域，生成语义锚定的提示变体并在训练中随机采样以增加多样性；ADMCD融合局部patch、全局语义和纹理线索，用轻量级Transformer生成融合表示，采用简单阈值决策规则检测复制，无需大规模标注数据集训练。
AI.result: 实验表明RAPTA在保持高合成质量的同时减少过拟合，ADMCD可靠检测复制且优于单模态指标。
AI.conclusion: RAPTA通过区域感知的提示增强有效减少过拟合，同时保持高合成质量；ADMCD通过多模态特征融合可靠检测复制，优于单模态指标。两种方法互补，共同解决扩散模型的版权和隐私风险。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on text-to-image diffusion models for copyright/privacy protection in 2D IMAGE generation, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D MOTION generation from 2D video. While both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - this paper deals with image generation and copy detection, while the profile needs video-to-3D-motion generation, visual-guided motion extraction, and cross-modal alignment for motion representations. This is a textbook example of using similar methods (diffusion) in completely different application domains.

title: Rooftop Wind Field Reconstruction Using Sparse Sensors: From Deterministic to Generative Learning Methods
summary: Real-time rooftop wind-speed distribution is important for the safe operation of drones and urban air mobility systems, wind control systems, and rooftop utilization. However, rooftop flows show strong nonlinearity, separation, and cross-direction variability, which make flow field reconstruction from sparse sensors difficult. This study develops a learning-from-observation framework using wind-tunnel experimental data obtained by Particle Image Velocimetry (PIV) and compares Kriging interpolation with three deep learning models: UNet, Vision Transformer Autoencoder (ViTAE), and Conditional Wasserstein GAN (CWGAN). We evaluate two training strategies, single wind-direction training (SDT) and mixed wind-direction training (MDT), across sensor densities from 5 to 30, test robustness under sensor position perturbations of plus or minus 1 grid, and optimize sensor placement via Proper Orthogonal Decomposition with QR decomposition. Results show that deep learning methods can reconstruct rooftop wind fields from sparse sensor data effectively. Compared with Kriging interpolation, the deep learning models improved SSIM by up to 32.7%, FAC2 by 24.2%, and NMSE by 27.8%. Mixed wind-direction training further improved performance, with gains of up to 173.7% in SSIM, 16.7% in FAC2, and 98.3% in MG compared with single-direction training. The results also show that sensor configuration, optimization, and training strategy should be considered jointly for reliable deployment. QR-based optimization improved robustness by up to 27.8% under sensor perturbations, although with metric-dependent trade-offs. Training on experimental rather than simulated data also provides practical guidance for method selection and sensor placement in different scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了一个从观测学习的框架，利用风洞实验PIV数据，从稀疏传感器重建屋顶风场。对比了Kriging插值与UNet、ViTAE、CWGAN三种深度学习模型，并研究了训练策略、传感器密度和优化方法对重建效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 屋顶风场对无人机、城市空中交通系统、风控制系统和安全屋顶利用至关重要。然而，屋顶流动表现出强非线性、分离和跨方向变异性，使得从稀疏传感器重建流场变得困难。
AI.method: 开发了从观测学习的框架，使用风洞实验的粒子图像测速(PIV)数据。对比了Kriging插值与三种深度学习模型(UNet、ViTAE、CWGAN)。评估了两种训练策略(单风向训练SDT和混合风向训练MDT)，传感器密度从5到30，并在±1网格的传感器位置扰动下测试鲁棒性，使用QR分解的POD进行传感器布局优化。
AI.result: 深度学习方法可有效从稀疏传感器重建屋顶风场。与Kriging相比，深度学习模型SSIM提升最高32.7%，FAC2提升24.2%，NMSE提升27.8%。混合风向训练相比单风向训练，SSIM提升173.7%，FAC2提升16.7%，MG提升98.3%。QR优化在传感器扰动下鲁棒性提升27.8%，但存在指标权衡。
AI.conclusion: 传感器配置、优化和训练策略应联合考虑以实现可靠部署。QR优化提升了鲁棒性，但存在指标依赖的权衡。基于实验数据的训练为不同场景下的方法选择和传感器布局提供了实践指导。

title: InterEdit: Navigating Text-Guided Multi-Human 3D Motion Editing
comment: The dataset and code will be released at https://github.com/YNG916/InterEdit
summary: Text-guided 3D motion editing has seen success in single-person scenarios, but its extension to multi-person settings is less explored due to limited paired data and the complexity of inter-person interactions. We introduce the task of multi-person 3D motion editing, where a target motion is generated from a source and a text instruction. To support this, we propose InterEdit3D, a new dataset with manual two-person motion change annotations, and a Text-guided Multi-human Motion Editing (TMME) benchmark. We present InterEdit, a synchronized classifier-free conditional diffusion model for TMME. It introduces Semantic-Aware Plan Token Alignment with learnable tokens to capture high-level interaction cues and an Interaction-Aware Frequency Token Alignment strategy using DCT and energy pooling to model periodic motion dynamics. Experiments show that InterEdit improves text-to-motion consistency and edit fidelity, achieving state-of-the-art TMME performance. The dataset and code will be released at https://github.com/YNG916/InterEdit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InterEdit3D数据集和TMME基准，用于研究文本引导的多人3D运动编辑任务。提出InterEdit模型，采用同步无分类器条件扩散架构，通过语义感知计划令牌对齐和交互感知频率令牌对齐技术，有效捕捉高层交互线索和周期性运动动态，在多人运动编辑任务中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导3D运动编辑在单人场景中取得成功，但扩展到多人场景面临挑战，原因包括：1)配对数据有限；2)人物间交互的复杂性。现有方法缺乏专门针对多人运动编辑的研究和基准。
AI.method: 提出InterEdit，一个同步无分类器条件扩散模型，包含两个核心模块：1)语义感知计划令牌对齐(Semantic-Aware Plan Token Alignment)，使用可学习令牌捕捉高层交互线索；2)交互感知频率令牌对齐(Interaction-Aware Frequency Token Alignment)，利用DCT和能量池化建模周期性运动动态。
AI.result: 实验表明，InterEdit在文本到运动一致性和编辑保真度方面都有显著提升，在TMME基准上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: InterEdit在TMME任务上实现了最先进的性能，提高了文本到运动的一致性和编辑保真度。该方法通过语义感知计划令牌对齐和交互感知频率令牌对齐两个创新模块，有效捕捉了高层交互线索和周期性运动动态。

The application domains are different: the profile is about video-to-motion generation, while this paper is about editing existing motion sequences using text. While both involve 3D human motion and use diffusion models, the core task differs - motion editing vs. video-based motion extraction. The paper doesn't address the pain points about 2D video priors, VLM quality control, or visual-guided feature extraction from video.

title: V-Bridge: Bridging Video Generative Priors to Versatile Few-shot Image Restoration
comment: Transfer the prior knowledge of video generative models to image restoration tasks
summary: Large-scale video generative models are trained on vast and diverse visual data, enabling them to internalize rich structural, semantic, and dynamic priors of the visual world. While these models have demonstrated impressive generative capability, their potential as general-purpose visual learners remains largely untapped. In this work, we introduce V-Bridge, a framework that bridges this latent capacity to versatile few-shot image restoration tasks. We reinterpret image restoration not as a static regression problem, but as a progressive generative process, and leverage video models to simulate the gradual refinement from degraded inputs to high-fidelity outputs. Surprisingly, with only 1,000 multi-task training samples (less than 2% of existing restoration methods), pretrained video models can be induced to perform competitive image restoration, achieving multiple tasks with a single model, rivaling specialized architectures designed explicitly for this purpose. Our findings reveal that video generative models implicitly learn powerful and transferable restoration priors that can be activated with only extremely limited data, challenging the traditional boundary between generative modeling and low-level vision, and opening a new design paradigm for foundation models in visual tasks.

AI.tldr: V-Bridge是一个将大规模视频生成模型应用于少样本图像恢复的框架，通过将图像恢复重新解释为渐进生成过程，仅用1000个训练样本（<2%现有方法）即可实现多任务图像恢复，性能匹敌专门设计的架构。
AI.motivation: 大规模视频生成模型在多样化的视觉数据上训练，内化了丰富的视觉世界结构、语义和动态先验。然而，这些模型作为通用视觉学习器的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。传统图像恢复方法需要大量任务特定数据，且为每个任务设计专门架构。

title: Reasoning over Video: Evaluating How MLLMs Extract, Integrate, and Reconstruct Spatiotemporal Evidence
summary: The growing interest in embodied agents increases the demand for spatiotemporal video understanding, yet existing benchmarks largely emphasize extractive reasoning, where answers can be explicitly presented within spatiotemporal events. It remains unclear whether multimodal large language models can instead perform abstractive spatiotemporal reasoning, which requires integrating observations over time, combining dispersed cues, and inferring implicit spatial and contextual structure. To address this gap, we formalize abstractive spatiotemporal reasoning from videos by introducing a structured evaluation taxonomy that systematically targets its core dimensions and construct a controllable, scenario-driven synthetic egocentric video dataset tailored to evaluate abstractive spatiotemporal reasoning capabilities, spanning object-, room-, and floor-plan-level scenarios. Based on this framework, we present VAEX-BENCH, a benchmark comprising five abstractive reasoning tasks together with their extractive counterparts. Our extensive experiments compare the performance of state-of-the-art MLLMs under extractive and abstractive settings, exposing their limitations on abstractive tasks and providing a fine-grained analysis of the underlying bottlenecks. The dataset will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 该研究针对具身智能体的抽象时空推理能力评估提出了VAEX-BENCH基准，通过构建合成自我中心视频数据集和结构化评估框架，揭示了现有MLLMs在抽象推理任务上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基准主要强调提取性推理，而多模态大语言模型能否执行抽象性时空推理——即整合时间观察、组合分散线索、推断隐含空间和上下文结构——仍不清楚。
AI.method: 构建了结构化评估分类法，设计了可控的、场景驱动的合成自我中心视频数据集，包含物体、房间和楼层平面三个层级，并设置五对抽象与提取推理任务进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验暴露了当前最先进的MLLMs在抽象推理任务上的局限性，并提供了细粒度的瓶颈分析。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了VAEX-BENCH基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型在视频抽象时空推理方面的能力，并揭示了当前模型在此类任务上的局限性。

title: NOIR: Neural Operator mapping for Implicit Representations
summary: This paper presents NOIR, a framework that reframes core medical imaging tasks as operator learning between continuous function spaces, challenging the prevailing paradigm of discrete grid-based deep learning. Instead of operating on fixed pixel or voxel grids, NOIR embeds discrete medical signals into shared Implicit Neural Representations and learns a Neural Operator that maps between their latent modulations, enabling resolution-independent function-to-function transformations. We evaluate NOIR across multiple 2D and 3D downstream tasks, including segmentation, shape completion, image-to-image translation, and image synthesis, on several public datasets such as Shenzhen, OASIS-4, SkullBreak, fastMRI, as well as an in-house clinical dataset. It achieves competitive performance at native resolution while demonstrating strong robustness to unseen discretizations, and empirically satisfies key theoretical properties of neural operators. The project page is available here: https://github.com/Sidaty1/NOIR-io.

AI.tldr: NOIR是一个将医学影像任务重新定义为连续函数空间算子学习的框架，通过隐式神经表示和神经算子实现分辨率无关的转换，在多个任务和数据集上展现出竞争力的性能和强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在挑战当前医学影像领域基于离散网格的深度学习范式，提出将核心医学影像任务重新定义为连续函数空间之间的算子学习问题。现有方法受限于固定像素或体素网格，而作者认为应该探索分辨率无关的函数到函数转换方法。
AI.method: NOIR框架将离散医学信号嵌入到共享的隐式神经表示(Implicit Neural Representations)中，学习神经算子(Neural Operator)来映射潜在调制，实现分辨率无关的函数到函数转换。在多个2D和3D下游任务上进行评估，包括分割、形状补全、图像到图像翻译和图像合成。
AI.result: 在Shenzhen、OASIS-4、SkullBreak、fastMRI等多个公开数据集以及内部临床数据集上，NOIR在原生分辨率下达到具有竞争力的性能，表现出对未见离散化的强鲁棒性，并实证验证了神经算子的关键理论性质。
AI.conclusion: NOIR成功地将医学影像任务重新定义为连续函数空间中的算子学习问题，为医学影像分析提供了一种新的分辨率无关的深度学习范式，具有良好的泛化能力和理论保证。

title: FDeID-Toolbox: Face De-Identification Toolbox
summary: Face de-identification (FDeID) aims to remove personally identifiable information from facial images while preserving task-relevant utility attributes such as age, gender, and expression. It is critical for privacy-preserving computer vision, yet the field suffers from fragmented implementations, inconsistent evaluation protocols, and incomparable results across studies. These challenges stem from the inherent complexity of the task: FDeID spans multiple downstream applications (e.g., age estimation, gender recognition, expression analysis) and requires evaluation across three dimensions (e.g., privacy protection, utility preservation, and visual quality), making existing codebases difficult to use and extend. To address these issues, we present FDeID-Toolbox, a comprehensive toolbox designed for reproducible FDeID research. Our toolbox features a modular architecture comprising four core components: (1) standardized data loaders for mainstream benchmark datasets, (2) unified method implementations spanning classical approaches to SOTA generative models, (3) flexible inference pipelines, and (4) systematic evaluation protocols covering privacy, utility, and quality metrics. Through experiments, we demonstrate that FDeID-Toolbox enables fair and reproducible comparison of diverse FDeID methods under consistent conditions.

AI.tldr: FDeID-Toolbox是一个综合性人脸去识别工具箱，通过模块化架构实现标准化数据加载、统一方法实现、灵活推理和系统性评估，促进FDeID方法的公平可比研究。
AI.motivation: 人脸去识别（FDeID）领域存在碎片化的实现、不一致的评估协议以及研究结果之间无法比较的问题。这些挑战源于任务本身的复杂性：FDeID涉及多个下游应用（如年龄估计、性别识别、表情分析），需要从三个维度（隐私保护、效用保留和视觉质量）进行评估，导致现有代码库难以使用和扩展。
AI.method: 提出FDeID-Toolbox，一个用于可重现FDeID研究的综合工具箱，采用模块化架构，包含四个核心组件：(1)主流基准数据集的标准化数据加载器，(2)从经典方法到最先进生成模型的统一方法实现，(3)灵活的推理管道，(4)涵盖隐私、效用和质量指标的系统性评估协议。
AI.result: 通过实验证明，FDeID-Toolbox能够在一致条件下对不同的FDeID方法进行公平和可重现的比较。
AI.conclusion: FDeID-Toolbox解决了FDeID研究中可重现性和可比性问题，为隐私保护计算机视觉研究提供了标准化工具。

title: Perceive What Matters: Relevance-Driven Scheduling for Multimodal Streaming Perception
summary: In modern human-robot collaboration (HRC) applications, multiple perception modules jointly extract visual, auditory, and contextual cues to achieve comprehensive scene understanding, enabling the robot to provide appropriate assistance to human agents intelligently. While executing multiple perception modules on a frame-by-frame basis enhances perception quality in offline settings, it inevitably accumulates latency, leading to a substantial decline in system performance in streaming perception scenarios. Recent work in scene understanding, termed Relevance, has established a solid foundation for developing efficient methodologies in HRC. However, modern perception pipelines still face challenges related to information redundancy and suboptimal allocation of computational resources. Drawing inspiration from the Relevance concept and the information sparsity in HRC events, we propose a novel lightweight perception scheduling framework that efficiently leverages output from previous frames to estimate and schedule necessary perception modules in real-time based on scene context. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed perception scheduling framework effectively reduces computational latency by up to 27.52% compared to conventional parallel perception pipelines, while also achieving a 72.73% improvement in MMPose activation recall. Additionally, the framework demonstrates high keyframe accuracy, achieving rates of up to 98%. The results validate the framework's capability to enhance real-time perception efficiency without significantly compromising accuracy. The framework shows potential as a scalable and systematic solution for multimodal streaming perception systems in HRC.

AI.tldr: 针对HRC流式感知中的延迟问题，提出利用前一帧输出进行实时感知模块调度的轻量级框架，在降低27.52%延迟的同时保持高精度
AI.motivation: 在现代人-机器人协作(HRC)应用中，尽管逐帧执行多感知模块可提升离线感知质量，但在流式感知场景中会累积延迟导致系统性能大幅下降；现有感知管道面临信息冗余和计算资源分配不当的挑战
AI.method: 提出了一种轻量级感知调度框架，利用前一帧的输出根据场景上下文实时估计和调度必要的感知模块
AI.result: 实验表明该框架将计算延迟降低最多27.72%，MMPose激活召回率提升72.73%，关键帧准确率达到98%
AI.conclusion: 所提出的感知调度框架能够有效提升实时感知效率，同时不显著牺牲精度，为HRC中的多模态流式感知系统提供了一种可扩展且系统的解决方案

title: Towards Spatio-Temporal World Scene Graph Generation from Monocular Videos
summary: Spatio-temporal scene graphs provide a principled representation for modeling evolving object interactions, yet existing methods remain fundamentally frame-centric: they reason only about currently visible objects, discard entities upon occlusion, and operate in 2D. To address this, we first introduce ActionGenome4D, a dataset that upgrades Action Genome videos into 4D scenes via feed-forward 3D reconstruction, world-frame oriented bounding boxes for every object involved in actions, and dense relationship annotations including for objects that are temporarily unobserved due to occlusion or camera motion. Building on this data, we formalize World Scene Graph Generation (WSGG), the task of constructing a world scene graph at each timestamp that encompasses all interacting objects in the scene, both observed and unobserved. We then propose three complementary methods, each exploring a different inductive bias for reasoning about unobserved objects: PWG (Persistent World Graph), which implements object permanence via a zero-order feature buffer; MWAE (Masked World Auto-Encoder), which reframes unobserved-object reasoning as masked completion with cross-view associative retrieval; and 4DST (4D Scene Transformer), which replaces the static buffer with differentiable per-object temporal attention enriched by 3D motion and camera-pose features. We further design and evaluate the performance of strong open-source Vision-Language Models on the WSGG task via a suite of Graph RAG-based approaches, establishing baselines for unlocalized relationship prediction. WSGG thus advances video scene understanding toward world-centric, temporally persistent, and interpretable scene reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出ActionGenome4D数据集和世界场景图生成(WSGG)任务，通过三种方法（PWG、MWAE、4DST）实现对场景中观察和未观察对象的推理，推进视频场景理解向世界中心化、时序持久化方向发展。
AI.motivation: 现有时空场景图方法从根本上仍然是帧中心的：仅推理当前可见对象、对象遮挡时丢弃实体且仅在2D空间操作。需要解决对象持久性问题和未观察对象的推理问题。
AI.method: 提出三种互补方法探索未观察对象推理的不同归纳偏置：1) PWG通过零阶特征缓冲区实现对象持久性；2) MWAE将未观察对象推理重新定义为掩码完成与跨视图关联检索；3) 4DST用可微分的每对象时间注意力替代静态缓冲区，并丰富3D运动和相机姿态特征。此外还设计评估了基于Graph RAG的强开源视觉语言模型在WSGG任务上的表现。
AI.result: 构建了ActionGenome4D数据集（将Action Genome视频升级为4D场景，包含世界坐标系的边界框和密集关系注释），并为未定位关系预测建立了基线。
AI.conclusion: WSGG任务推进视频场景理解向世界中心化、时间持久化和可解释的场景推理方向发展，为未定位关系预测建立了基线。

title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind? Evaluating State Evolution in Video World Models
summary: Evolutions in the world, such as water pouring or ice melting, happen regardless of being observed. Video world models generate "worlds" via 2D frame observations. Can these generated "worlds" evolve regardless of observation? To probe this question, we design a benchmark to evaluate whether video world models can decouple state evolution from observation. Our benchmark, STEVO-Bench, applies observation control to evolving processes via instructions of occluder insertion, turning off the light, or specifying camera "lookaway" trajectories. By evaluating video models with and without camera control for a diverse set of naturally-occurring evolutions, we expose their limitations in decoupling state evolution from observation. STEVO-Bench proposes an evaluation protocol to automatically detect and disentangle failure modes of video world models across key aspects of natural state evolution. Analysis of STEVO-Bench results provide new insight into potential data and architecture bias of present-day video world models. Project website: https://glab-caltech.github.io/STEVOBench/. Blog: https://ziqi-ma.github.io/blog/2026/outofsight/

AI.tldr: STEVO-Bench是一个评估视频世界模型能否将状态演化与观察解耦的基准测试
AI.motivation: 探索视频世界模型生成的"世界"是否能在不被观察时自主演化，即模型能否将状态演化与观察过程解耦
AI.method: 通过遮挡物插入、关闭光源、相机"视线转移"轨迹等观察控制手段，对自然演化过程进行评估，自动检测和 disentangle 视频世界模型的失败模式
AI.result: 暴露了当前视频世界模型在将状态演化与观察解耦方面的局限性，揭示了现有模型的数据和架构偏差
AI.conclusion: 为理解和改进视频世界模型提供了新的视角，强调模型需要具备独立于观察的状态演化建模能力
